programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encore
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as an aging hoodlum who is artificially transplanted back to the 1930s and the scene of his unsolved crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Tram
programme.desc: The leaders of two underworld factions call a top-level meeting at a ski resort to set up a financial holding company capable of creating chaos within the national economy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Mindbend
programme.desc: To help the IMF team break up a crime syndicate that specializes in brainwashing ex-convicts into committing political assassinations, Barney substitutes for a former prisoner looking for an operation to give himself a new appearance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Shape-Up
programme.desc: Guest stars Gerald S. O'Loughlin and Christopher Stone portray crime syndicate bosses in charge of the waterfront who extort huge sums of money from every ship docking at a west coast port.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Miracle
programme.desc: An undercover agent is murdered while trying to intercept a huge heroin shipment in the Pacific Northwest and the IMF team is called to take over and put the dealer and his chief executioner out of business.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encounter
programme.desc: Guest star Elizabeth Ashley plays the alcoholic wife of a crime syndicate leader whose involvement in an intimidation racket and the cold-blooded murder of an employee puts the IMF team on his trail.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underwater
programme.desc: Stolen gems worth seventy-five million dollars scheduled to be fenced to an underworld figure suddenly disappear and the ship on which they were being transported is blown up at sea bringing the IMF team into the picture.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Invasion
programme.desc: Guest star Kevin McCarthy plays the role of a highly-placed Defense Department advisor who has murdered an Air Force official and sold vital top-secret material about America's nuclear defenses to foreign powers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blues
programme.desc: Barney poses as a prospective rock-music recording artist to get evidence linking an organized crime figurehead played by guest star William Windom to the sudden death of a beautiful recording star who was being blackmailed by the syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Visitors
programme.desc: Guest star Steve Forrest plays the role of a millionaire publisher and communications tycoon who has sold fifty-one percent of his empire to an underworld crime syndicate which gives them a powerful influence over state politics.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nerves
programme.desc: Christopher George guest stars in the role of a psychotic ex-convict determined to wreak vengeance on society.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Run for the Money
programme.desc: Guest stars Richard Jaeckel and Herbert Edelman play gangsters who try to get control of all the illegal betting parlors in the country as well as a virtual takeover of all thoroughbred horse racing.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Connection
programme.desc: Jim Phelps and his IMF team are given the assignment of breaking an underworld ring attempting to set up one of the world's largest drug manufacturing plants off the coast of Africa.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bride
programme.desc: Casey poses as a young peasant girl from Europe imported to be the bride of Joe Corvin, the top man at getting underworld millions into Swiss banks.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Stone Pillow
programme.desc: Guest star Bradford Dillman plays Edison, a former private detective turned extortionist who is blackmailing a powerful crime chief with a roll of film linking him to murder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Image
programme.desc: Barney assumes the identity of a powerful psychic from a Caribbean island kingdom in order to hypnotize a defecting crime syndicate leader into revealing his super secret list of government officials on the take.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Committed
programme.desc: Nora Dawson, a witness to a murder, is committed to an asylum and is being systematically driven out of her mind with drugs when the IMF team is given twenty-four hours to save her life.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Bag Woman
programme.desc: Posing as a bag woman for a crooked politician, Casey unknowingly carries an attached case locked to her wrist filled with both money and a bomb set to explode upon opening.

programme.title: A Christmas Feast
programme.desc: Det er jul og familien Oliverio gjør seg klare til De Syv Fiskers Middag, en italiensk kulinarisk tradisjon som har sine røtter fra gamlelandet. Midt i forberedelsene undrer Tony, en ung mann med store drømmer, om han vil finne kjærligheten i julen.

programme.title: A Midsummer's Hawaiian Dream
programme.desc: I denne parafrasen av Shakespeares "A Midsummer Night's Dream" to gifte antropologiprofessorer og studentene deres prøver å finne en hellig tiki for å stoppe ødeleggelsene av Hawaii-jungelen.

programme.title: Who Gets The Dog
programme.desc: Når Olive og Clay møttes var det kjærlighet ved første blikk, de giftet seg, kjøpte seg hus og adopterte en nyfødt valp - Wesley. Nå er det 6 år siden, og de har bestemt seg for å skille lag, og begge ønsker å ta sin elskede Wesley med seg.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer spiller Frankie, en servitrise som jobber på en kaffebar i New York. Etter en rekke vonde forhold er en ny mann det siste Frankie ser etter... helt til en kommer og ser etter henne.

programme.title: The Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: En kvinne må velge mellom sin stabile ektemann og en lidenskapelig, men uforutsigbar elsker, i et konservativt britisk samfunn på 1950-tallet.

programme.title: Couples Vacation
programme.desc: På randen til havari i ekteskap og karriere drar den arbeidsløse forfatteren Jack Spencer og hans kone Amanda på ferie. Med en uventet dobbeltbooking blir den private, romantiske luksusen alt annet enn privat og romantisk.

programme.title: Upside of Anger
programme.desc: Da Terry Wolfmeyers (Joan Allen) mann plutselig en dag forlater henne og deres fire døtre uten så mye som et ord til farvel, snus tilværelsen for den vellykkede forstadsfamilien fullstendig på hodet!

programme.title: Boys And Girls
programme.desc: Ryan (Freddie Prinze, Jr.) and Jennifer (Claire Forlani) couldn't be more different. As kids, they couldn't stand one another. As adults, its their differences that bind them together in this fun RomCom from the director of SHE'S ALL THAT.

programme.title: Peace, Love & Misunderstanding
programme.desc: ”Peace, Love & Misunderstanding” er et hjertevarmt portrett av en fargerik familie. Det som var ment bare å være en helgtur endrer seg raskt til å bli et sommereventyr fylt med romantikk, familiehemmeligheter, og det som trengs for å være lykkelig.

programme.title: Shivers NO
programme.desc: A cult favorite, Shivers is David Cronenberg's feature-length debut about parasites invading a luxury apartment complex and turning its residents into violent, sex-crazed maniacs.

programme.title: Cube
programme.desc: Syv fremmede med svært ulike personligheter blir ufrivillig plassert i en endeløs labyrint med dødelige feller.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Cabin Pressure
programme.desc: On a flight to Washington with Purdy (David Ogden Steirs), Johnny has a vision of their plane crashing and must convince the pilot and onboard Air Marshall to risk the lives of everyone on board.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Come Wander with Me
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Where is Everybody?
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: From Agnes - With Love
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: You Drive
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Execution
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Uncle Simon
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Walking Distance
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Cavender is Coming
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Still Valley
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Midnight Sun
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What's in the Box
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Encounter
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Speak Now
programme.desc: As a young couple is about to tie the knot, Johnny has a troubling vision of their future and must find a way to reveal what he sees.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Cycle of Violence
programme.desc: When Johnny has a vision of a school shooting, the principal focuses on a particularly outspoken student focuses on a particularly outspoken student as the likeliest culprit while Johnny struggles to discover the identity of the shooter.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Instinct
programme.desc: Johnny and Walt (Chris Bruno) investigate the sudden violent behavior of the animals around Cleaves Mills while Reverend Purdy (David Ogden Stiers) wrestles with his faith and past decisions.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trouble with Templeton
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Grave
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dust
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A World of Difference
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Stop at Willoughby
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Quality of Mercy
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: Før Halloween må teamet infiltrere et dypt, enormt hulesystem for å hindre en flaggermusbestand i å ødelegge det nordamerikanske økosystemet.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sly and the Family Stone
programme.desc: På valgdagen, når demokratiet står på spill, blir Team Scorpion kalt inn når noen prøver å skape kaos i det amerikanske presidentvalget.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Mother Load
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion reiser til Irland for Megans ettårsjubileum, oppdager Walter at en naturkatastrofe i en innsjø i nærheten har skapt en giftig sky som kan drepe alle i landsbyen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: This Is the Pits
programme.desc: Paiges mor verver Team Scorpion når hun ved et uhell oppdager en glemt atomreaktor i ferd med å eksplodere.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Walter må svømme gjennom de dødelige La Brea-tjæregropene mens teamet hjelper en kvinne som sitter fast i tjæren før hun går tom for oksygen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Det er julaften og Team Scorpions elektronikkfrie ferie på fjellet blir dødelig når de støter på våpensmuglere og Ralph blir kidnappet mens de prøver å rømme.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: Når et oppdrag i ørkenen resulterer i eksploderende splinter som skader Cabe alvorlig, må Team Scorpion fryse kroppen for å redde livet hans.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion blir lurt til å produsere falske penger for en utenlandsk enhet som ønsker å ødelegge den amerikanske økonomien, må Paige stole på moren Veronicas ferdigheter som svindler for å redde dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Teamet må redde en mann på kanten av et enormt synkehull som truer med å ødelegge Los Angeles vannforsyning for alltid.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpions jobb med å finne sunkne skatter går galt når Walter og Paiges båt eksploderer, og etterlater dem fortapt midt i Stillehavet omgitt av haier.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Keep It in Check, Mate
programme.desc: Walter og Sylvester deltar undercover i en internasjonal sjakkkturnering på fremmed jord for Team Scorpion for å ta ut en amerikansk spion før identiteten hennes avsløres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
programme.desc: Når et enkelt oppdrag for å beskytte en viktig frøbank går galt, må Team Scorpion redde Happy, Sylvester og Cabe, som begynner å lide av livstruende, fryktbaserte hallusinasjoner.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Don't Burst My Bubble
programme.desc: Etter en kraftig storm, sitter Happys venn Ada, som lever i en steril boble for å beskytte sitt kompromitterte immunsystem, igjen med farlig avfall i ferd med å punktere strukturen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Monkey See, Monkey Poo
programme.desc: For å stoppe et farlig virus fra å spre seg, må Team Scorpion finne en sjelden truet ape i Amazonas som har antistoffet for kuren.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Broken Wind
programme.desc: Under et oppdrag for å reparere en turbin ved en vindpark, må Team Scorpion skynde seg for å redde Paige og Happy før kabelen som holder gondolen de er i, går i stykker.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Rock Block
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må trosse ordre fra en utenlandsk regjering når de henter en asteroide fra verdensrommet som inneholder DNA-tråder som kan få dødelige konsekvenser hvis de blir utsatt for luft.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Strife on Mars
programme.desc: Team Scorpion blir sittende fast i en kollapsende og farlig biodom beregnet på Mars mens de prøver å få et par forskere ut.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Satellite of Love
programme.desc: Den nye direktøren for Homeland Security gjenforener teamet når en atomdrevet russisk satellitt blir slått ut av bane og må omdirigeres før den detonerer over Sør-California.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion drar til Cuba når en kvinne fra Cabes fortid ber ham om å hjelpe til med å fange en serbisk krigsforbryter.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Fish Filet
programme.desc: For å redde livene til tre dommere går Sylvester undercover i et føderalt fengsel, men Team Scorpion må bryte ham ut når livet hans er i fare.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Robots
programme.desc: Walter, Cabe og Happy er fanget sammen med mannskapet i en topphemmelig ubåt når en eksplosjon sender den til bunnen av havet med begrenset oksygen og en selvdestruksjonsfunksjon som snart vil aktiveres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Karlstad
programme.desc: Tareq visits sunny Karlstad! Here, food is prepared by Vänern's shores and in Värmland's deep forests. Butter-fried Zander, crepes and cooking over an open fire are on the menu.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Best Of (Part 2)
programme.desc: Once again, Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Lund
programme.desc: In this episode, Tareq visits Lund, a thousand-year old city in southern Sweden. Lund is surrounded by the richest farmland in the country, and we explore nearby islands and meet entrepreneurs making highly-regarded local products.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Bornholm
programme.desc: Tareq sails out to Bornholm, a Danish island close to southern tip of Sweden. The islanders are fiercely self-sufficient and this attitude reflects in the huge number of food producers making products that are sold both locally and internationally.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Jokkmokk
programme.desc: Far above the Arctic Circle, Tareq explores the wild country around Jokkmokk. Here, the Sami people lived from what the land provides for thousands of years. This wild cuisine is as extreme as the weather here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Åland
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Åland’s shipping fleet was the envy of navies around the world, and their sea trade was encouraged by the seafood, grains and fruits that thrive on these islands. Tareq prepares recipes to reflect Åland’s unique cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Finland's South Coast
programme.desc: Tareq takes a late autumn trip along Finland’s southern coast. He stops in the capital Helsinki to see how the city's food culture is about to be discovered by the rest of the world, and dives into the freezing waters around Ekenäs.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Giftstoff
programme.desc: En tidligere kjemiker ved et stort farmasøytisk selskap har tuklet med noen medisiner, og Don og Megan må finne ham.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Helt inn til beina
programme.desc: Da en ung forsker ved Heritage Museum blir funnet død, kalles Don og Megan inn for å etterforske dødsfallet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Forbrent
programme.desc: Don og teamet må finne brannstifteren som står bak en uskyldig manns død. "Bill Nye the Science Guy" har gjesterolle som professor Waldie, som hjelper Charlie og Larry med å gjenskape backdraft-effekten ved Cal Scis laboratorium.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Gangster
programme.desc: Da en FBI-agent som jobber undercover blir drept i et gjengoppgjør, må Don og teamet etterforske saken.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Satsning
programme.desc: Da FBI kalles inn for å etterforske et drap ved en pokerklubb i Los Angeles, avslører Don og agentene en komplisert korttellingsplan der en gruppe collegestudenter, hvis liv nå står i fare, er innblandet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Innhøsting
programme.desc: Etter å ha avdekket at en ung kvinnelig immigrant døde da hun solgte en av nyrene sine, må agentene stoppe et nettverk som selger organer.

programme.title: Numb3rs: På flukt
programme.desc: En naturfagsstudent ved Cal Sci blir mistenkt da en dyr maskin blir stjålet fra skolens DNA-lab.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Protest
programme.desc: En anti-krig-bombe som dreper en uskyldig mann blir en personlig affære da etterforskningen avdekker overraskende informasjon om fortiden til Don og Charlies far.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Psykologisk spill
programme.desc: Da en synsk mann fører myndighetene til et drapssted, prøver Charlie å bevise at det var en ren tilfeldighet. John Glover spiller Samuel Kraft, en synsk mann som leder letemannskapet til et åsted i villmarken.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the FBI uncover a possible terrorist attack on Los Angeles that targets the city's water supply.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When thieves hijack a truck filled with valuable medical supplies, $50 million dollars intended for a relief effort in Zambia and two aid workers, the FBI races a second violent crew intent on getting to the goods first.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: In the wake of a deadly standoff with a mysterious, yet, brilliant bomber, Don and Charlie discover that he was poisoned to keep him from exposing a shocking secret that will change the FBI team forever, on the third season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Agent Colby Granger lands in prison after the discovery that he was a mole within the FBI, but he escapes, and it's up to Don and his team to track him down and uncover the truth on the fourth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A typical morning at a coffee shop turns into a nightmare when a car collides into it, leaving one person dead and many injured. But what appears to be a car's accidental loss of control is soon exposed to be more.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A series of secrets and blackmail involving a young, up and coming actor are exposed when Don and his team investigate the murder of a young woman in his Hollywood Hills mansion.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: After recognizing numerological patterns in the Bible verses that the killer leaves behind, Don and his team are able to track the killer's movements but are one step behind when a gripping twist brings the chase to an end.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A bank for the rich and powerful is robbed but the stolen contents of the safety deposit boxes are being liquidated and donated to charities, and it's up to Don and Charlie to uncover the true motivation behind the humanitarian thief.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don feels responsible for the death of a participant in the Witness Protection Program after she is gunned down in her home.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team investigate the secret world of alternate reality games after a man plunges to his death while participating in one such game. Amita's life is in danger when her hidden gaming ability becomes the key to tracking down the killer.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a mega-heiress is abducted by an extremist group looking to punish her industrialist father, Don and the team rush to find her captors, but their attempt to save her takes a startling turn when they to uncover the group's true motivation.

programme.title: Giallo
programme.desc: En morder herjer i Torino, og en besatt etterforsker må finne ham før hans neste offer lider en grufull skjebne i denne mørke giallo-thrilleren.

programme.title: Posse
programme.desc: En U.S. Marshal jakter ikke bare på rømlinger, han sørger også for at en fotograf er i nærheten for å forevige bragdene hans. I POSSE oppdager han snart at berømmelsen kan være flyktig når han retter blikket mot sitt første mål, raneren Jack Strawhorn.

programme.title: A Snake of June
programme.desc: Rinko og Shigehiko er et merkelig par med en sterk forbindelse som mennesker, men ikke som et par. De lever som venner og er uavhengige, fornøyde med livsstilen – helt til Rinko mottar en pakke med bilder av seg selv mens hun onanerer.

programme.title: The War Of The Worlds
programme.desc: Gene Barry og Ann Robinson er blant menneskene som blir fascinert når en meteorlignende gjenstand faller ned ... men passasjerene er definitivt ikke vennligsinnede.

programme.title: Welcome to Collinwood
programme.desc: Cosimo får en plan for en kjempejobb av sin cellekamerat. Han ber kvinnen sin om å finne en patsy for tyveriet av bilen hans, og tilbyr 15 000 dollar. Plutselig er 7 involvert.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Bill Murray spiller Tripper Harrison, sjefsveileder på Camp North Star. Det blir underholdende når han, og den skandaløse gjengen hans av leirveiledere, har det for seg å bryte alle regler i boka.

programme.title: Hercules in New York
programme.desc: Bannlyst fra Olympus, blir Hercules (Arnold Schwarzenegger) sendt til Jorden, hvor han finner ekte kjærlighet og starter en lysende karriere som kroppsbygger.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: Ett blikk, og du vet at de er fra et veldig rart sted. De er fra New Jersey, via "Frankrike", via Remulak langt ute på viddene. De er Coneheads.

programme.title: Disaster Movie
programme.desc: DISASTER MOVIE fortsetter den komiske nedturen til din yndlingsgruppe med latterlig attraktive 20-åringer. En skjebnesvanger natt prøver de å komme seg i trygghet mens enhver kjent naturkatastrofe, knuser byen og deres vei.

programme.title: Number 17
programme.desc: En gjeng tyver samles i et trygt hus etter et ran, men en detektiv er på sporet deres.

programme.title: Pumping Iron
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger og Lou Ferrigno møter hverandre i en intens konkurranse om Mr. Olympia-tittelen i denne kritikerroste filmen som gjorde Schwarzenegger berømt.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Lilith overtaler Frasier til å gi avkall på det urbane liv og flytte til en hytte i skogen.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca anklager den amerikanske forsvarssjefen for å ha stjålet diamantøredobbene hennes.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam later som han er impotent for å bli bedre kjent med en kollega av Lilith og Frasier

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Den rike kjæresten til Woody setter ikke pris på den billige bursdagpresangen hun får av ham. Rebecca fornyer seg for å øke sine karrieremuligheter.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody blir hekta på gambling, og Carla venter spent på at Eddie skal overraske henne på bryllupsdagen.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam prøver å overtale Rebecca til å skvære opp med søsteren sin.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca anklager en velkjent utroskapsekspert for å legge an på henne.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam får nesten sjansen til en date med Rebecca, helt til en kjekk bedriftshai kommer inn.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca tar en tur til Beverly Hills med Robin i hans privatfly.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam vurderer å åpne en egen bar for å gi livet mening.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frykten for å binde seg gjør Cliff gal når han sier ja til frieriet fra kjæresten.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Mens Sam angrer på det raske salget av Corvetten, får Norm vite at det er vanskeligere å være sjef enn det ser ut til.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Mens barens gjester og ledelse feirer Cheers 100-årsjubileum, føder Lilith en gutt.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Etter Eddies tidlige død, oppdager Carla at mannen hennes levde et dobbeltliv når hun møter hans andre kone i begravelsen.
programme.sub-title: Death Takes a Holiday on Ice

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier kidnapper sin egen sønn for å hindre ham i å bli rituelt omskåret i henhold til den jødiske tradisjonen.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Gutta på Cheers har en skjeggvekstkonkurranse for å teste mannligheten.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Når Rebeccas plan om å overraske Robin Colcord med en romantisk kveld slår feil, ender hun opp fanget i Robins toppleilighet med Sam.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Mens Norms eks-sekretær faller for Cliff, søker Rebecca etter en "skjult skatt" i en gave fra Robin.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam, Carla og Norm seiler i Robin Colcords båt når de oppdager at det finnes en bombe om bord.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebeccas favorittprofessor kommer på besøk, og til stor vantro har professoren en kort affære med Sam.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff blir trukket av scenen når han er en deltaker på Jeopardy.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam oppdager Rebeccas mann med en annen kvinne.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca finner ut at hun ikke er den eneste kvinnen i Robins kjærlighetsliv.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woodys kjærestes mor, en vakker, eldre kvinne, gjør seksuelle fremskritt mot ham.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier er opprørt når Liliths nye bok betegner ham som en kjedelig, pålitelig "godgutt"

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebeccas planer for en romantisk dag med Robin blir ødelagt når han velger å tilbringe dagen med å konkurrere mot Sam.
programme.sub-title: Indoor Fun with Sammy and Robby

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla får stor skyldfølelse når hun skjuler pengene fra sin avdøde manns eiendom for den andre enken.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam, Cliff og Norm ydmyker seg selv når de feilaktig tror at rivalene deres på en annen bar har gjort Cheers til mål for enda en narrestrek.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody gir Kelly en løftering når faren ordner en tur til Europa for henne.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla frykter at Eddies ånd hjemsøker henne når hun bestemmer seg for å begynne å date igjen.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam mener at han endelig har lurt Rebecca til å tilbringe natten med ham, men til slutt får han vite hvem som egentlig blir lurt.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Etter at Robin ber Rebecca om å flytte sammen med ham, får hun vite at han har utnyttet henne i planene om å overta selskapet hennes.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam får tilbake eierskapet for baren samt en etterlengtet mulighet med Rebecca. Han overlater Robin til myndighetene for innsidehandel.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Robin kommer uventet tilbake etter å ha havnet på feil side av Rebecca og lovens lange arm.
programme.sub-title: Love Is a Really, Really Perfectly Okay Thing

programme.title: COPS: The Truth Is Key
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS: Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS: Rock Star
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS: Window of Opportunity
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an armed suspect, the cops are called when a man damages his neighbor's window, and deputies investigate a parking garage known for illegal activity.

programme.title: COPS: Mommy's Tears
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS: Running Scared
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.title: COPS: Time to Climb
programme.desc: A couple flee a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.

programme.title: COPS: Dine and Flee
programme.desc: A sting operation is set up to catch narcotics dealers. A man flees a restaurant without paying his four-hundred-dollar tab. A traffic stop for a tint violation leads to a felony arrest for narcotics.

programme.title: COPS: Gas up and Run!
programme.desc: A man is tasered twice after struggling with two deputies. A gas station fight ends in a foot chase. A deputy pulls over a pair of quarreling lovers after they run a stop sign.

programme.title: COPS: Settled with a Pipe
programme.desc: A man attacking a woman is tackled by an officer. A vehicle is pulled over for a drug deal in progress. A woman smashes a car window with a pipe in a fit of road rage.

programme.title: COPS: Dyed in the Wool
programme.desc: A suspect selling narcotics takes off on foot. A bank robber leaves his wallet in an abandoned money bag. Multiple domestic violence calls end in arrests.

programme.title: COPS: The House Always Wins
programme.desc: A suspect runs from an illegal gambling game claiming shots were fired. A man is caught trespassing on school grounds. A male driver wearing a halter top is pulled over for a minor traffic violation.

programme.title: COPS: Allergy Season
programme.desc: A drunk driver rams into a pursuing police car. A man on a bike flees an area known for drug activity on a bike. A sniffling man attempts to hide a baggie with narcotics under his shirt.

programme.title: COPS: Yard Work
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a call of a man shooting a gun in his front yard. Officers are called to a domestic dispute over an wrinkly infant's shirt. Four armed and suspicious men are spotted by deputies.

programme.title: COPS: Keep it Down!
programme.desc: An officer is forced to subdue a suspect with his baton. A man asks deputies to give him back his drugs before taking him to jail. A man causes a disturbance at an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS: Hot Potato
programme.desc: A man tosses his stash after being pulled over. Officers question two men in a fight who live with the same woman. A man says his shorts are from a thrift store after drugs are found in them.

programme.title: COPS: Nerves of Noodles
programme.desc: A man tells deputies the pants he has on aren't his. Officers are called to the scene of men firing an ak-47. A nervous driver fesses up to the deputy who stopped him.

programme.title: COPS: Fight and Flight
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: COPS: Who Let the Dogs Out?
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS: Dead Man Flushing
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS: Pistol Packin' Families
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS: Grown Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: COPS: Kill 'Em With Kindness
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS: The Fighting Kind
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS: Cell Phone Secrets
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS: Guns, Hash, and Fire Hydrants
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: COPS: Get Off My Roof
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: COPS: This Man Stabbed Me
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS: Blood and Scars, Bro!
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: COPS: My Jewelry's Fragile
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS: Fast Food Escape
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: COPS: Late Night Snacks
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: COPS: Cops We Run the Show
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: COPS: Doggie Paddle
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: COPS: Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: Police investigate suspicious activity in a known drug area, officers encounter a jaywalker with the munchies, and a woman caught with meth wants points for honesty.

programme.title: COPS: You Didn't Get Very Far
programme.desc: A man complains of heart trouble after running from police, a suspect in a stolen car leads officers on a wild chase, and police check on a disabled vehicle and its occupants.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Not My Text Messages
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)
programme.desc: The lifeless, mutilated body of a woman is found in the Rambouillet Forest.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case
programme.desc: On September 12, 2013, Eric Mosser, a 45-year-old heating engineer, discovers his wife Isabelle lying in a pool of blood at their home in Illfurth, Alsace.
programme.sub-title: A Strange Deadly Robbery: The Isabelle Mosser Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murderous Lovers - Anne Bardot
programme.desc: The disturbing missing case in Paris of 4 years old.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)
programme.desc: On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had found her unconscious in the bathroom with a mysterious plastic bag next to her
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Jean-Jacques Le Page Case
programme.desc: On the morning of July 24th 2009, a fire erupts at house in Plougonvelin.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Four Lovers For One Crime: The Joël Deprez Affair
programme.desc: On February 5, 2000, two hunters discover a charred body on the banks of the Oise.
programme.sub-title: Four Lovers For One Crime: The Joël Deprez Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Émilie Godest Case
programme.desc: On November 9th 2007, around 11:30PM, aid arrives on the scene of an accident at the exit of Chateney-en-France.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)
programme.desc: Laetitia Perrais, 18, a trainee hotel waitress, vanishes after evening service.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle
programme.desc: On March 19th 1998, Akira Ojima, a 57 years old japanese architect, is found dead in the fridge of a villa in Nanterre.
programme.sub-title: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Priscillia Ciatti Case
programme.desc: The corpse of Priscillia Ciatti, 14, is discovered by the side of a field, a few hundred metres from her family home. The teenager has been stabbed sixty times with a knife and –an extra sordid detail – a devil mask is found next to her body.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case
programme.desc: On March 28th 2013, the burnt body of Anne Barbot, 38 years old, is discovered in a forest of Maine-et-Loire.
programme.sub-title: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake
programme.desc: On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows?
programme.sub-title: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Willy Pomonti Case
programme.desc: Willy Pomonti, a retired architect, is found savagely murdered in his opulent villa in La Celle-Saint-Cloud, near Paris. It soon becomes clear that the man has been tortured prior to death.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)
programme.desc: On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed.
programme.sub-title: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Adeline Piet Case
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! What has happened to Adeline Piet?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.
programme.sub-title: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Diana, som etter en operasjon fikk bryster som var plassert på magen, og Dorthe, som føler seg forrådt av kirurgen sin etter en neseoperasjon som har gitt henne skjev nese.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 511
programme.desc: Drømmen om en "vakrere" kropp blir ikke alltid som man håper.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Vi møter Connie som ønsket seg naturlige bryst, men som ble anbefalt av sin kirurg å sette inn de største implantatene. Britt sparte i fem år til en operasjon som gav henne skjeve bryst.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Etter to graviditeter sitter Majbritt igjen med to hengende bryster, og hun bestemte seg derfor for å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 509
programme.desc: Som 16-åring brakk Philip nesen i en slåsskamp og har siden den gang prøvd å få den fikset gjennom en rekke operasjoner i utlandet. Alle operasjonene har mislyktes.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 310
programme.desc: Vi møter bodybuilderen Ulla som ønsket seg kvinnelige bryster, men som nå har så store implantater at hun har vanskelig for å trene. Patrik har fått fjernet hud på magen, men er misfornøyd.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 606
programme.desc: Claudia går ned 100 kilo og får deretter fjernet overflødig hud. For å avslutte reisen mot en kropp som Claudia kan føle seg stolt av, bestemte hun seg for å gjøre en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jane, som ikke lenger har lyst på sex på grunn av de stygge brystene sine, og Julie, som misliker seg selv på grunn av de store arrene hun fikk etter en brystreduksjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 904
programme.desc: Jeannes bryster hindrer henne i å leve et normalt liv. Gitte skammer seg over beina og bruker enormt mye tid og energi på å skjule dem.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 309
programme.desc: Ditte har brukt 120 000 kroner på å få større bryster - som er asymmetriske. Eva har fått utført en brystreduksjon, men føler seg nå mer maskulin enn feminin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 802
programme.desc: For første gang i programmets historie har både mor og datter havnet i et plastisk mareritt, og begge trenger hjelp.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Isabella, som fikk utført brystforstørring som 18-åring for å ligne Pamela Anderson, men som i dag sitter igjen med to steinharde kuler på brystkassen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 104
programme.desc: Pernille får kick av å få utført plastisk kirurgi, men armene hennes er vansiret av store arr. Mille drømmer om at de feilopererte brystene hennes blir fiksa før bryllupet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 205
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Dianne, som fikk fjernet brystene grunnet mistanke om kreft, men som nå lever alene fordi hun føler seg utilpass, og Anette, som fikk foretatt en hudoperasjon i utlandet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Doris var med i en alvorlig bussulykke og i dag sliter hun med ekstreme bivirkninger av en operasjon som egentlig skulle ha reddet utseendet hennes etter ulykken.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 601
programme.desc: Charlotte fikk fjernet brystimplantatene sine på grunn av komplikasjoner. Etter det fikk hun en protese for å kompensere for størrelsen på brystene, men protesen er både ubehagelig og upraktisk.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 106
programme.desc: Vi møter fire personer som har gjort plastikkirugi som har fått ødeleggende konsekvenser: blant annet Lone som lever i frykt for at implantatene hennes er kreftfremkallende.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jonna, som føler at magen hennes ligner et bombekrater etter en operasjon, og Christina, som har tre mislykkede operasjoner bak seg.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 703
programme.desc: Den tidligere burlesk-danseren Grethe måtte i 2011 fjerne begge brystene som en del av hennes behandling av brystkreft.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 101
programme.desc: I kveldens episode møter vi fire ofre for plastiskkirurgiske feiloperasjoner.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.
