programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Tak / Elv
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head blir sittende fast på taket av Tom Andersons hus./ Beavis og Butt-Head seiler på dekk i en elv og ender opp på sjøen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Choke / Career day
programme.desc: Eating chicken can be hazardous / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support
programme.desc: After the Manager explains that Workers Compensation pays you for getting injured on the job, Butt-head sets out to injure Beavis / A Vampire craze hits the high school / Beavis and Butt-Head misinterpret what it means to ask a man for his daughter's hand
programme.sub-title: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Killing Time / Dude, a Reward
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV. / Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Teen Talk / vs.the Vending Machine
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems. / The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Fluktrommet/Den viktige
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å løse Fluktromgåten, bare for å bli fanget på badet. / Beavis møter sin største helt - Ild.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Snille Butt-Head/ Hjemmehjelp
programme.desc: Butt-Head får medisin for sin aggresjon mot Beavis og blir litt for snill./ Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head går tom for ølpenger, så Beavis må finne seg en jobb.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies
programme.desc: Our duo find out that accidents can lead to money / Beavis and Butt-Head get annoyed at a fly / After a beating by Todd, they become best friends over beer
programme.sub-title: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Virtuelt vannvidd / Utestengt
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head tar på seg solbriller og tror de er virtual reality-briller./ Beavis og Butt-Head blir låst ute av huset og ødelegger det når de prøver å komme seg inn.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Cyber-Butt / Citizens arrest / Pierced
programme.desc: The school PC gets internet and Stewart helps out friends surf the net / An armed robbery has hilarious consequence / Beavis and Butt-Head get beaten up and inspired to get their ears pierced

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bus trip / Green thumbs
programme.desc: The class goes on a roadtrip / Beavis and Butt dabble into counterfeit money using a photocopier

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Meet God
programme.desc: Innocent, naive yougsters Beavis & Butt-head are drawn into an insidious religious cult.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: 1-900-BEAVIS / Water Safety
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to start their own phone service / Beavis and Butt-head learn CPR from Mr. Buzzcut

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Friday Night / Tornado
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head spend Friday night at the local convenience store. / Beavis & Butt-head in their own mini-disaster movie with new friends Lolita and Tanqueray.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests. / Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.
programme.sub-title: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den nye fienden / Dobbelgjengeren
programme.desc: Vaskebjørner stjeler Beavis og Butt-Heads nachos, og guttene slår tilbake./ Beavis forveksler en fremmed med Butthead, og kan ikke bli kvitt ham.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Bokset inne / Birøktere
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head fanges i en pappeske mens de prøver å gjemme seg på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å sanke honning fra et vepsebol.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak
programme.sub-title: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bathroom Break / The Rat
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head decide to devote as much of their time at work as possible to bathroom breaks. / A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? A rat takes up residence and they stop at nothing.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head take woodworking class / Stevensons get a sattelite dish / An unopened can puts our duo to new adventures / Beavis and Butt-Head form a band called Metallica
programme.sub-title: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Buy Beer / Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test. / Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride. / Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.
programme.sub-title: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV. / With a big test looming, our favorite idiots receive an education in cheating. / Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in an elevator with a smokin hot chick
programme.sub-title: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery
programme.desc: The school closes and makes the best day / Butt-Head phones in a mail-order bride / Burger World launches a home delivery service
programme.sub-title: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Stewart is Missing / Yard Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Stevenson shows up at Butt-head's house, desperate to enlist their help in finding Stewart. / Tom Anderson get Beavis and Butt-head to watch his yard sale, and the boys manage to sell everything when they take the sale inside.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Tainted Meat / Bad Dog
programme.desc: Beavis and his bacteria ridden "thingy" contaminate the food at Burger World. / Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Crisis line / Career day
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head set out to support callers on a crisis line / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Walking Erect (aka Boner Watch) / Beaverly Buttbillies
programme.desc: On a quest to see morning wood at the zoo, Beavis and Butt-head discover (to their dismay) that humans are the only animals that walk erect. / Beavis and Butt-head try to strike it rich in their backyard, just like Jed Clampett.
programme.sub-title: Walking Erect (aka Boner Watch) / Beaverly Buttbillies

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Nydebut-jentene
programme.desc: Veteranene kjemper for plassene mens de nye prøver å leve drømmene og gjennomgå treningsleiren til DCC. De stilles overfor panelintervjuer, soloer, en slitsom dansekombinasjon og et rom med tøffe dommere.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dette er sværingene
programme.desc: De nye kandidatene får en tankevekker om hva det innebærer å være en DCC. Jentene kjemper for å lære dansene. Melissa Rycroft treffer nykommerne for første gang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Time to Push
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit; Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship; stress increases on makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Big Surprises
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up; uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show approach; two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Intervention
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko; Kitty Carter rocks some of the candidate's worlds; cameos give Kelli and Judy a fresh perspective on the girls; at Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Rehearsals with the Stars
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp comes to an end; Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake; Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Squad announcement feels bittersweet as some favorites go home; the team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting; Game Day arrives.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Judge's Showcase
programme.desc: Lagets største og mest talentfulle klassen på treningsleiren må imponere DCC-dommerne med soloer og gruppedans for å få være med. Melissa Rycroft er også med.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: You Came To Play!
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft kommer til første øvelse for å lete etter artistmentorer. Så rusker Brittany Perry-Russell opp i kandidatene med koreografien sin.. Med Melissa Rycroft og Brittany Perry-Russell.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Call the Medic!
programme.desc: Kandidatene får lære teknikker så sparkene blir ennå høyere. Kelli blir urolig for en kandidat da Evan Miller underviser i hurtigkoreografi. Med Melissa Page og Evan Miller.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: I sluttuttaket er konkurransen beinhard. Nå må de som har overlevd, konkurrere mot erfarne veteraner om en av de ettertraktede plassene på DCCs treningsleir.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: Treningsleiren er i gang! De nye kandidatene er spente, og kanskje fulle av beundring, når de treffer veteranene for første gang på Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: Etter bare to uker på treningsleiren må noen elimineres. Men først skal jentene prøve draktene. Det er et bittersøtt øyeblikk for nykommerne siden de ennå ikke har gjort seg fortjent til dem.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: Etter å ha tatt farvel med en av sine egne, forstår de resterende treningsleir-kandidatene at ingens posisjon på troppen er sikker. Kitty Carter blir bedt om å jobbe med de svakeste jentene og piske dem i form.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hele troppen trenger en oppvekker og det skal de få av gjestekoreograf Kitty Carter. Hun leder gruppen gjennom en knallhard danseøvelse som gjør noen av jentene til emosjonelle vrak. Så er det tid for en leksjon i DCCs etikette.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Noen drømmer går i oppfyllelse når de gjenværende heldige treningsleir-kandidatene står modell i den ikoniske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-drakten under en sexy fotoseanse.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Flere kan miste plassen på laget, og det er bare to øvelser igjen. Jentene drar på seg de berømte hvite cowboy-støvlene for første gang. Så skal Judy og Megan Fox bedømme deres endelige danserutiner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: Seks hundre nervøse og spente Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader-aspiranter ankommer et hotell til de første uttakene. Hver deltaker får mindre enn to minutter på seg til å utføre en freestyle-danserutine foran dommerne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: I det endelige uttaket er det bare de sterkeste som overlever. DCC-aspirantene må nå konkurrere mot veteranene om en plass på treningsleiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: Hvis kandidatene trodde at uttaket var tøft, får de seg en overraskelse når den brutale treningsleiren sparkes i gang. Uke 1 på Valley Ranch starter med at jentene finner ut hva dommerne hadde å si om dem.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: Det er bare den tredje uken av treningsleiren, men det er allerede tid for å gjøre kutt. Hvem vil overleve? Uken starter med tilpassing av drakten der også aspirantene får prøve på det berømte blå og hvite antrekket.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: DCC-"looken" - rett hår eller krøller? Blond eller rødhåret? Jentene aner ikke hva Kelli og salongdirektøren Rainer Schneck har planlagt for dem når de får sine dramatiske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders- makeovers.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Når DCC-direktøren Kelli Finglass gir en tidligere deltaker en utrolig sjanse til å delta på treningsleiren tre uker etter starten, er det mye å ta igjen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Hun er tilbake! Den beryktede Kitty Carter kommer til Valley Ranch for å undervise DCCene i teknikk. Deretter skal Charlotte Jones Anderson guide en gruppe cheerleadere på en privat tur rundt Cowboys Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Kelli og Judy må ta tøffe beslutninger som er rettferdige, men vonde. Det er oppgjørets time for de gjenværende treningsleir-kandidatene, da det bare er to repetisjoner igjen før den siste elimineringen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: For første gang er det det praktfulle Cowboys-stadionet i Texas som er basen for Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-uttaket. Over 600 aspiranter med drømmer om å komme på 2010-2011 DCC-laget ankommer før soloppgang for innledningsrunden.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: De 47 nye jentene som skal delta på DCC-finaleuttaket har hatt to uker til å forberede seg, men er de klare til å danse sammen med de 27 tilbakevendende DCC-veteranene?

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 12
programme.desc: At Barnsley Casualty the team clock on to a backlog of patients waiting to be transferred to wards. With no beds across the entire hospital, Sister Jane Hawksworth is battling to prevent patients being on trolleys for the NHS maximum of 12 hours.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 13
programme.desc: After an extraordinarily busy few days, the team at Barnsley Casualty are struggling to clear the backlog of patients, and new arrivals are waiting up to 5 hours to see a doctor.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 14
programme.desc: Sister Jane Hawksworth is on duty, ‘I think the sister team is strong, we are all strong women.' Sister Benita Wainwright heads to Resus where paramedics rush in a 14-year-old girl having a prolonged epileptic seizure.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 15
programme.desc: It’s been a busy night at Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty Department, so the corridors are already packed full of patients when Sister Benita Wainwright arrives to head the shift.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 16
programme.desc: In charge today at Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty Department is Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey, ‘Emergency departments may look very chaotic but there’s a reasonable amount of structure. It’s organized chaos!’

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 17
programme.desc: Barnsley Casualty is facing one of its toughest shifts to date. With no children’s beds available across the whole of Yorkshire and a department filling up with poorly children the hospital is under pressure.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 18
programme.desc: Registrar Doctor Gemma Hartshorne prepares to treat a man who has suddenly lost all feeling in his foot. Loss of blood flow is turning Roger's foot white - urgent treatment is needed to prevent amputation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 19
programme.desc: Trainee Advanced Nurse Practitioner Chantelle Proctor assesses a 49-year-old man rushed in by ambulance. Philip, who has a heart condition, collapsed at home and has been vomiting for the last ten days.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 20
programme.desc: While people enjoy a most wonderful time of the year, Barnsley Hospital Casualty is open for business as usual, and the team are getting into the Christmas spirit. Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey is leading the festive shift.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: While Sister Jane runs outside to help a critical patient in the car park, Matron Val and Consultant Doctor Dave Walker need to negotiate with the Police who are stopping new arrivals entering the building.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: Junior Doctor Tom Fish’s first patient is 18-year-old Lewis who has broken bones and deep wounds from a moped accident - but causing him the most pain is his fear of needles.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Sister Benita is running the shift, when suddenly, a fire alarm goes off and she must prepare the entire department - staff and emergency patients - for a full evacuation.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: Sister Harriet spots Terry waiting in the queue and decides he needs urgent care. He’s fallen off a roof and is unable to move his arm from a position above his head.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: Priority is being given to two patients fighting for breath: 72-year-old Lynda and 2-year-old Seb. Junior Doctor Emma Faragher is treating Lynda. ‘Not being able to breathe is absolutely terrifying,’ says Doctor Faragher.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: Consultant Doctor Julian Humphrey looks after a 76-year-old woman who has come in after a nasty fall. She has broken her nose but Doctor Humphrey fears that bleeding on the brain could have much more serious long-term consequences.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: Doctor Carson’s caseload also includes Wayne, who was found with head injuries at the bottom of a flight of stairs, and 4-year-old Pippa who’s been brought in with severe sickness.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: As winter hits, the cold weather causes a spike in admissions at Barnsley Hospital. And for the casualty team those no letup in the blue light arrivals. Carole is rushed in after being found collapsed outside her home.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: It’s all change at Barnsley Casualty as a new system is introduced. Sister Benita is taking on the role of Team Leader for the first time, ‘Being in charge is nice,’ says Benita.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 10
programme.desc: The department is full and waiting time to see a doctor has doubled but ambulances are still bringing in critically ill patients.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In West London, former exotic dancer Dione’s flat is bursting at the seams with a lifetimes collection of memorabilia and hand me down relics. Help is at hand as deep cleaning arrive to clear the hoard.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In the South Wales Valleys, 42-year-old Phillip has it all, he runs a successful business, he’s in a long-term relationship, he owns his own home and... he has a rat infested, humongous hoard.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 12
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Alan, a sound therapist who has lived on his own for 20 years. His son has tried to help him clean, but it’s a battle he’s never been able to win.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 4
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Anita from Manchester, who’s house is overrun with her 3 cats who make a mess wherever they like.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 5
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Scout Leader and Single mum of two; Debbie from South London, whose 2-bed flat is drowning in clutter and filth.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: Hoarding is on the rise and it's believed that 1 in 20 people could have a problem. With over 1.2 million problem hoarders in the UK today, one could be your neighbour?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: Susan's hoard has made her virtually homeless. Brian has dedicated his life to hoarding and his daughter is sick of it. Jake is lucky to be alive as his home almost burned to the ground in an inferno fuelled by the clutter he'd collected.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: Arthur's flat is packed with junk. Experts Caz and Tee are up for their toughest assignment ever. Khim is getting married but first she must clear her hoard. Mandi's passion for vintage clothes is out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: Esther's hoard is so bad her landlord told her to clear up or clear out. Nigel receives a visit from fellow hoarder Janice.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: Paul's hoard fills his whole house, room after room after room is buried under 6 feet of clutter.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Sue from Oxford whose house is overflowing with possessions. Sue married the love of her life in 2015, and he moved in, bringing everything he owned with him.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 11
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Joanna from Birmingham, whose 2-bedroom flat is overflowing with possessions. Joanna works two jobs, leaving her no time to look after her home.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the picturesque city of Bath, Paul’s cottage is bursting at the seams with a lifetime’s collection of junk. Known locally as ‘boot cottage’ - because everything Paul owns and wears comes from car boot sales - every room is a no-go zone.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: In Harlow, 63-year-old Bubbles’ high-rise flat is packed with piles of junk she can’t bear to throw away. But it doesn’t end there she also has a staggering 4 lock ups stuffed to the gills with rubbish.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In Mansfield Sue’s hoard is driving her family and grandchildren away and her husband Neil to distraction. Every room is crammed with clutter including a bedroom that looks more like a dolls graveyard than somewhere to sleep.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Liverpool, the Bells are a family at war over hoarding. Mum Betty and son Richard are happy to live in their mess, but son in law Keith is determined that things must change. Can they change the habit of a lifetime and part with their possessions?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: In the London suburb of Enfield, former workaholic Sandra has become a hoard-aholic since retiring. Her compulsion to spend is out of control, and everything is added to the growing mountains of books, clothes and candles…

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of American born dog loving Dani from Shepton Mallet who moved to the UK with high hopes of living the English Country dream, but bad health got the better of her.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is on his way to a risky roadside rescue. A 38-tonne mail lorry has taken door step delivery to another level by crashing on a London street.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: There's a tricky situation for Recovery Operator Stephen in Warwickshire after an overnight frost makes a narrow country lane as slippery as an ice rink, causing a road sweeper to slide into a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: It's 4.30am and as Britain's network of roads and motorway stir the team at Lantern gear up for a huge emergency call out. An 18-wheel trailer carrying two portacabins has caught fire closing 3 lanes of the eastbound carriageway of the M25.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Lantern Recovery Op, Merrie faces a dangerous challenge when a twenty-ton drinks lorry gets grounded on a boggy verge. The truck is stuck fast and initial attempts to pull it free leave the lorry leaning over and threatening to topple on its side.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, Sean is in a race against time to shift a tractor unit and trailer fully laden with 27 tonnes of wood, after it left a busy section of road and toppled over into a muddy ditch alongside a row of bushes.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire Recovery Operator Jay hopes he won't have sleepless nights over an Artic stacked full of bed frames and mattresses which has careered off a busy A road into a dry-stone wall and is lying in a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: Around the UK a 16-meter lorry loaded with waste flips over near a busy roundabout, a fully loaded bin lorry suffers a rear axle failure in the middle of its rubbish round and a double-height car transporter piled high with vehicles needs rescuing.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: Lantern op Stuart is at a rollover, it's going to be a massive job. Crouch's Mark has a bridge strike, he needs to hurry, the police are already on scene. Lantern's Merrie is called to collect a small truck and gets more than she bargained for!

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: Crouch Incident manager Steve Kelly and his team have been called out to a lorry that has caught fire on the extremely busy A1. By the time Steve arrives the fire has been put out and Callum has pulled the tractor unit onto a low loader.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Lantern recovery op Stuart is called out to assist in the rescue of a rollover. On arrival he finds an artic carrying at least 1,500 boxes of A4 paper has tipped over on a busy roundabout

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: Steve Kelly and his team have been called out to an artic that caught fire on the M6 and now needs to be removed from the motorway. When Steve arrives, the tractor unit has already been taken away, but the double decker trailer has been badly damaged.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: An artic loaded with gas canisters has slid down the embankment, it will be an epic challenge for 3 of Lantern's most experienced operatives. In the East Midlands Troy has been sent to save a truck that has broken down on a busy single carriageway.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alpha Recovery joins the team as Op Kev is tasked with rescuing a 45-tonne mobile crane. In London, Merrie rescues a truck on a narrow road between train lines. Abang performs a risky rescue of a van and trailer. We catch up with ex-driver Rory.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: In the North East at Alpha Recovery, Kevin is faced with a real challenge. Crouch driver Abang has to save a sportscar that's gone off the road. Lanterns Merrie has a surprise for a Trucking Hell superfan and Aidan is faced with a busted bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: An Artic has come off the carriageway so Crouch sends in the big hitters. Alpha's Aidan is with a bus which has stopped near a school. Merrie must risk life and limb to rescue a coach and Lantern op Sean dices with death on a notorious road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: On the Moors, a 50 ton construction machine has landed in a stream. The team at Alpha faces a dangerous two-day rescue. On The M1, Lantern's Bohdan rescues a stranded 44-ton artic and Stuart is called to the A34 to rescue a broken-down bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: On a remote track in the Yorkshire Dales, Kev and his fellow Alpha recovery ops are in the midst of one of their toughest rescue missions in years.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: On the busy A1 halfway between Newcastle and Durham an artic has veered into a 6-foot Armco roadside barrier, propelling it into the air and down a 20-metre embankment.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire Lantern Recovery op Sean has been sent to tackle a telehandler that's flipped over in the back of a very muddy garden. To make matters worse, the boom arm is extended and there are trees covering the site.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: On the M25 near Enfield two lorries, two cars, and a Transit have piled into each other blocking three of four lanes. In a ten-mile tailback, the Lantern team must recover the two artics.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 104
programme.desc: 10. august 2019 opplevde Norge nok et rystende terrorangrep. 21 år gamle Philip Manshaus dreper først sin 17 år gamle stesøster. Bevæpnet, og med uniform går han deretter til angrep mot Al-Noor moskeen i Bærum.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 101
programme.desc: Anne Elisabeth Hagen forsvinner sporløst fra sitt hjem høsten 2018. På en rød stol finner ektemann og milliardær, Tom Hagen et trusselbrev og krav om løsepenger.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Den 15. mai 2018 ble politiet i Örebro varslet om at Lena Wesström, en trebarnsmor, var forsvunnet fra hjemmet sitt. Et vitne hevder å ha hørt hjerteskjærende skrik fra en kvinne samme natt som Lena forsvant.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 202
programme.desc: Tidlig en søndag morgen i 2004 er den 22 år gamle sykepleierstudenten Anne Slåtten på vei til jobb, men hun dukker aldri opp. Etter et døgn blir hun funnet drept i. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av den omsorgsfulle jenta?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 501
programme.desc: Gjenopptakelseskommisjonen har siden 2018 vurdert om Norges mest kjente drapssak skal etterforskes på ny. Skal det endelig lykkes Per og Veronica Orderud å få gjenopptatt saken?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 302
programme.desc: I september 2003 blir en gutt seksuelt misbrukt av en mann i trappeoppgangen der han bor. Politiet starter en intens jakt på mannens identitet for å få stoppet ham. Samtidig kommer det stadig inn nye meldinger om overgrep.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 402
programme.desc: En sommerdag i 1999 sykler tolv år gamle Kristin Juel Johannessen hjemmefra på vei til badestranda. Samme kveld blir hun meldt savnet. Hvor har den unge jenta tatt veien?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 705
programme.desc: Psykolog Helena Bering forsvinner sporløst midt på dagen den 18. august 2004. Hun har nettopp avsluttet et møte med en klient på klinikken i Stockholm, når alle spor etter henne forsvinner.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 503
programme.desc: I 2007 kommer en mann og hans mor inn på politistasjonen i Bergen for å underrette om at hans kone, Dung Tran Larsen, har vært savnet i en uke. Hva skjedde egentlig med Dung?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 303
programme.desc: Tidlig på 90-tallet rystes den norske befolkningen av flere kirkebranner. I 1993 blir Øystein Aarseth funnet død i en trappeoppgang i Oslo. Politiet retter søkelyset mot enkelte personer i black-metal-miljøet. En av disse er Varg Vikernes.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 401
programme.desc: I mai 1995 blir 17 år gamle Birgitte Tengs funnet drept bare noen få hundre meter unna sitt hjem i Kopervik på Karmøy. Saken fører til omfattende etterforskning, og Birgittes fetter havner raskt i søkelyset.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 703
programme.desc: 18 år gamle Ndella Jack har nettopp kommet hjem fra bryllupsreise med mannen sin. Det som skulle være starten på deres liv sammen, får i stedet en brå slutt, da de blir ofre for et brutalt angrep.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 205
programme.desc: Etter meldinger om et rykende bål i Hafjell går drapsalarmen hos politiet på Lillehammer. På bålet viser det seg å ligge rester av et partert menneske. Samtidig meldes to personer savnet fra en bolig i nærheten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305
programme.desc: 19. desember 1994 setter Bjørn Thore Langemyhr seg på et tog fra Tønsberg til Oslo. Det er det siste familien ser til ham. Samtidig begynner ryktene å gå om at et belastet rusmiljø kan ha tatt livet av Langemyhr.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter en fest i juli 2017 forsvinner Tom Rune Hagen. Han har vært en del av et belastet rusmiljø, men akkurat denne uka har han planlagt en tur på fjellet for å fiske. Hva skjedde med Tom Rune?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 701
programme.desc: I september 2020 blir Erik Fasth funnet livløs i en blodpøl utenfor rommet til den funksjonshemmede kvinnen han er assistent for. Politiet begynner umiddelbart å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 502
programme.desc: I 2016 går politiet til aksjon i en privatbolig på Romerike. På eierens datamaskin finner de harddisker fulle av bilder og videosnutter med seksuelle handlinger fra unge gutter ned i 9-årsalderen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Wicked Dog, The Gospel According to Cesar, Cry Baby
programme.desc: Wicked star Eden Espinosa’s Yorkshire Terrier, Owen, is creating drama. The Redemptorist brothers at Holy Redeemer College in Washington, D.C. needed a guard dog. Rocky, a rescue, can’t stop crying.
programme.sub-title: Wicked Dog, The Gospel According to Cesar, Cry Baby

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Made in Japan, Lawnmower Licker
programme.desc: Marley, a neglected Shiba Inu from Japan, develops aggression towards dogs and people. Piper, a Wire Fox Terrier obsessively tries to get to and lick the lawnmower engine.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Doubt of a Shadow
programme.desc: Newly adopted Shadow starts to exhibit aggressive tendencies towards his family. A professional dog walker needs help with several of her clients.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Anti-Social Sasha
programme.desc: Sasha, a pound pup, is perfect in the house, but outside she shows aggression towards other dogs. Angler, a Lab, is blind, and exhibits strange behavior around food.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bullying Bulldog
programme.desc: Bulldog Buster is prone to biting and growling. Sadie, a 3 month old Beagle/terrier mix, is frightened of trash cans. Lacey develops anxiety at 11 years of age.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy: Red Alert
programme.desc: Pit Bull Buddy, was found chained and starving to death and was very aggressive. Rufus, a Rottweiler/Shar Pei mix, has bitten five people. Both need to get their aggression under control.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Dark Side of Chipper
programme.desc: Chipper, a 2-month old Ridgeback/Boxer mix has become progressively more aggressive and has attacked 5 dogs. Two Whippets, Rudy and Monte, are causing issues at their owner’s place of business.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: A pet groomer gets rave reviews but needs Cesar's help with handling some difficult clients. A Chihuahua makes a lot of noise, causing chaos with her cohabiters. Can Cesar install calm in the pack?

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Not So Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: A Border Collie is overly protective of her owner, nipping at anyone who comes near her. A Police Officer rescued a German shepherd, who is people and dog aggressive and always ready for a fight.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jake in Exile
programme.desc: An Australian Shepherd/Pit Bull Mix has severe aggression problems towards women. A Boxer is an expert escape artist, able to jump the 6 foot backyard fence. Her owners are concerned for her safety.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Language of Scrout
programme.desc: A Doberman Mix has taken control of his family home; an animal communicator calls for back-up with her Doberman Pinscher; and a comedienne enlists Cesar's help for her two temperamental rescue dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Fear of Dogs
programme.desc: After being attacked by a dog as a boy, a man must learn to overcome his fear of dogs for the sake of his career and his wife and children. Cesar is called in to exorcise Ernesto’s fear.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lotus Blossoms
programme.desc: A jealous dachshund learns to get along with both of his owners. Can Cesar exorcize a demon possessed German Shepherd that prevents his people from entering certain rooms of the house.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: The Red Zone
programme.desc: Two new sibling dogs fight over everything, from food to toys. Facing the possibility of giving up one of the pooches, Cesar travels south to end the civil war between the two dueling pit bulls.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Teenage Savior
programme.desc: Over 2,000 people gathered at a local PETCO in hopes of a session with Cesar. This episode follows two of these troubled canines. Things get serious when Cesar's son joins in to help.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Woof and Wheels
programme.desc: People and their dogs descended on a local PETCO to meet producers in the hopes of a session with Cesar Millan. Meet two of the problem pooches. Can Cesar dial down the bad behavior of these terrors?

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Widow’s Dilemma
programme.desc: After Noelle’s husband unexpectedly passed away, their two dogs developed behavioral issues. The Wilson family’s Italian Greyhound Hula, snaps and growls at certain family members.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Tenacious B
programme.desc: A French Bulldog is anxious around other dogs, and a Vizsla is afraid of cars. Can Cesar help one dog improve his social skills and steer the other's behavior toward the fast lane?

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Den skumle fisken
programme.desc: Sharon Marshs tante Flo har gaver til Shelly og Stan. Shelly får et flott stereoanlegg, mens Stan får en skummel fisk.

programme.title: South Park: Succubusen
programme.desc: Cartman går til optiker, som gjør narr av Cartmans vektproblemer og kaller ham 'Piggy'.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: Da Wall-Mart kom til byen
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle prøver å forhindre at Wall-Mart forvandler South Park til en spøkelsesby, men en besatt Cartman står i deres vei.

programme.title: South Park: Fåraktig
programme.desc: Mens han er på en gruppeterapitime mot hamstring, blir Stan fanget i en drøm om skolerådgiveren Mr. Mackey.

programme.title: South Park: Gothbarn 3: posørenes daggry
programme.desc: Goth-ungene sendes på leir for problembarn.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium er ikke gratis
programme.desc: Stan blir avhengig av det nye mobilspillet med Terrance og Phillip.

programme.title: South Park: Heksesønner
programme.desc: På den årlige Halloween-sammenkomsten, kaster en heks trolldom som terroriserer alle i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Råtne tomater
programme.desc: Barna i South Park påstår at de har sett mr. Garrison luske rundt i byen. Folk i byen er sinte fordi presidenten skremmer barna deres.

programme.title: South Park: Sparkesyklene
programme.desc: Ungene planlegger å bruke siste nytt innen forflytning for å skaffe seg mer godteri til halloween enn de har fått noen gang.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms Halloween Special
programme.desc: Det er Halloween og Randy må forholde seg til datterens marihuanaproblem.

programme.title: South Park: Øyekatarr
programme.desc: Det er Halloween i South Park, og Kenny blir drept av en styrtende romstasjon og forvandlet til en zombie, ved hjelp av balsameringsvæske og Worcestersaus.

programme.title: South Park: Universets største drittsekk
programme.desc: Cartman føler seg ikke bra etter å ha drukket Kennys aske og blitt besatt av sjelen hans, og sendes til sykehuset.

programme.title: South Park: Helvete på jord 2006
programme.desc: Det er halloween, og Satan holder verdens største kostymefest.

programme.title: South Park: De levende hjemløses natt
programme.desc: Uteliggere oversvømmer South Park, og guttene legger en lur plan for å flytte dem til en annen by, mens de voksne får panikk.

programme.title: South Park: Den ustoppelige
programme.desc: Evig uskyldige Butters er lei behandlingen han får av foreldrene, og blir litt for oppslukt av den nye vampyrfeberen.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Zimmermans verdenskrig
programme.desc: Cartman anser Token for å være en trussel mot hele menneskeheten.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Glødhet katolsk kjærlighet
programme.desc: Presten Maxi reiser til Roma da skandalen i den katolske kirken truer med å påvirke antallet kirkegjengere i South Park negativt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Den skumle fisken
programme.desc: Sharon Marshs tante Flo har gaver til Shelly og Stan. Shelly får et flott stereoanlegg, mens Stan får en skummel fisk.

programme.title: South Park: Succubusen
programme.desc: Cartman går til optiker, som gjør narr av Cartmans vektproblemer og kaller ham 'Piggy'.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Brothers
programme.desc: Vincent's "brother" Devin returns with Charles, a hideously deformed man seeking sanctuary.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Gentle Rain
programme.desc: Kanin, a resident of the Underworld, goes into a store on the surface and is recognized by a woman as the man who killed her son, years ago.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Outsiders"
programme.desc: When intruders penetrates their tunnel world, father decides to welcome them with gifts, but instead of gratitude, they are met with greed and violence. Things escalate to the point that tunnel dwellers have no other choice but to leave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Orphans
programme.desc: After her father dies, Catherine thinks about living the rest of her life in the world below.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Arabesque
programme.desc: Vincent's childhood sweetheart returns to the tunnels, and Vincent reveals a painful memory of her to Catherine.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: When the Blue Bird Sings
programme.desc: Catherine meets a persistent artist, who follows and spies on her. But this artist isn't all what he seems to be.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Watcher
programme.desc: On Vincent and Catherine's two year anniversary, Catherine receives a phone message indicating that someone is watching them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Distant Shore
programme.desc: Catherine heads out to L.A California, to find a witness for an investigation.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Trial
programme.desc: Catherine is put in charge of a murder case in court, and to bring justice to a five year old murdered son.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Kingdom by the Sea
programme.desc: Catherine is blocked out of an investigation involving a murder attempt by the C.I.A. But there are more shocks yet to come, and a familiar face returns.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Vincent witnesses their latest murder and is unable to stop them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: What Rough Beast
programme.desc: Catherine is attacked in the park by two men disguised as policemen.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ceremony of Innocence
programme.desc: Following the death of investigative reporter, Bernie Spirko, Elliot Burch and Catherine set out to find the man who hired and killed Spirko.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Rest Is Silence…
programme.desc: Following the ordeal with Paracelcus, Vincent moves forward toward a stress-aggravated mental collapse. Vincent continues to come to terms with the beast in himself and finds himself losing control of his thoughts.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Though Lovers Be Lost...
programme.desc: Catherine reaches Vincent in the catacomb and rescues Vincent from his madness. However, as Vincent begins to recover, he realizes he has lost his bond with Catherine and is unable to sense when she is in danger.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Walk Slowly
programme.desc: Following Catherine's death on the rooftop, Vincent takes her back to her apartment and leaves her on her bed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Short Drink from a Certain Fountain
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.
programme.sub-title: A Short Drink from a Certain Fountain

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ninety Years Without Slumbering
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Ring-A-Ding Girl
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: You Drive
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Among The Untrodden
programme.desc: Transfer student Irene's (Sophia Macy) unusual interests make her an easy target at her new all-girls boarding school until she discovers that popular classmate Madison (Abbie Hern) possesses a unique talent.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: 8.0
programme.desc: At the outer reaches of the world, a team of scientists discover a new highly intelligent species, but its existence may endanger more than their research. Joel McHale, Nadia Hilker, Michelle Ang, Tim Armstrong, and Brandon Jay McLaren guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Long Morrow
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Self-Improvement of Salvadore Ross
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Number Twelve Looks Just Like You
programme.desc: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang onto her own identity.
programme.sub-title: Number Twelve Looks Just Like You

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Black Leather Jackets
programme.desc: Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in. Yet the neighbors could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Human Face
programme.desc: A grieving couple's (Chris Meloni and Jenna Elfman) move is interrupted by an otherworldly encounter, leading them to second guess what's worth leaving behind. Tavi Gevinson also guest stars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Small Town
programme.desc: A quiet church handyman (Damon Wayans Jr.) uncovers a magical scale model imbuing him with the power to help his struggling small town. But with the sleazy Mayor Conway (David Krumholtz) taking all the credit, will Jason's good intentions be corrupted?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Night Call
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls haunt a disabled woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: From Agnes - With Love
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Spur of the Moment
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge
programme.desc: A Confederate spy is spared death when the rope meant to hang him miraculously breaks. Or does it?
programme.sub-title: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Try, Try
programme.desc: When the quick-witted Claudia (Kylie Bunbury) has a chance run-in with Mark (Topher Grace) at a museum, he dazzles her with his seemingly miraculous abilities. But after the true source of his charisma is revealed, the encounter takes a dark turn.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: You Might Also Like
programme.desc: Stay-at-home housewife Mrs. Warren (Gretchen Mol) looks forward to acquiring the widely marketed 'Egg,' an enigmatic device that promises to make everything better for everyone forever.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Queen of the Nile
programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What's in the Box
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Masks
programme.desc: A dying man demands his family wear masks that he's given them at a Mardi Gras party.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Am the Night - Color Me Black
programme.desc: On the day an unpopular idealist is to be executed for the killing of a racist bully, the townsfolk are shocked to see the skies have turned pitch black.
programme.sub-title: I Am the Night - Color Me Black

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Sounds and Silences
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Caesar and Me
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Jeopardy Room
programme.desc: Major Ivan Kuchenko is trapped inside a hotel room with Commissar Vassiloff, a hitman, and Boris, his assistant, in the room across the street. Vassiloff has planted a bomb in the room and Ivan must find it within three hours or be blown to bits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Stopover in a Quiet Town (aka Strangers in Town)
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.
programme.sub-title: Stopover in a Quiet Town (aka Strangers in Town)

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Encounter
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Garrity and the Graves
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Brain Center at Whipple's
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Come Wander with Me
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Beach Blanket Bizarro
programme.desc: Sabrina’s wild visions of her first college spring break turn squeaky-clean when her aunts ask 60’s teen idol Frankie Avalon to put a spell on the trip. This sends Sabrina and her friends into a world straight out of a 60’s beach movie.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witchright Hall
programme.desc: When Sabrina’s trouble-making teenage cousin Amanda is sent to live with Hilda and Zelda, they count on Sabrina to convince the headmaster and school director of Witchright Hall to accept Amanda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina the Activist
programme.desc: Sabrina, who is now in low spirits over her heavy course load and recent break up, decides to put her energy into something positive: leading a protest to save an historical building from demolition.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Do You See What I See?
programme.desc: Sabrina feels responsible when Miles considers giving up his paranormal research to settle in his father’s accounting business after no one believes the otherworldly phenomena he sees at the Spellman home.
programme.sub-title: Do You See What I See?

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Got Spirit
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to throw off Miles and the specialist he has hired to uncover paranormal activity in the house, but Sabrina herself discovers a ghost in the ceiling.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Finally!
programme.desc: Romance brews between Sabrina and Josh when they turn the coffeehouse into a single's night featuring entertainment by the band Eden's Crush.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Really Big Season Opener
programme.desc: Miles decides to make a student film in his favorite genre, horror, and enlists Sabrina as the producer of his film.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Date with Destiny
programme.desc: Sabrina and her friends return to school and a lot of excitement after summer break.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: What’s News?
programme.desc: Josh lands a job as a photojournalist for the Boston Citizen, and is surprised to learn that Sabrina is a fan of his new boss, Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Murder on the Halloween Express
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda are invited to attend a murder mystery party on the Halloween Mystery Train, which makes a stop in Boston.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Gift of Gab
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are thrilled to get their own show on the campus radio station, a two hour talk show they call "Chick Chat."

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Thin Ice
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a jam when ex-boyfriend Harvey requests that she use her magical powers to help him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hex, Lies, and No Videotape
programme.desc: Josh gets Sabrina an internship at the Boston Citizen where he works.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Humble Pie
programme.desc: Sabrina and her roommates discover that Morgan didn't pay her portion of the rent when the housing office sends a student to replace her in the house.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Birthday Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina receives an unexpected surprise on her birthday, a visit from her evil Aunt Irms, the matriarch of the Spellman family.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Deliver Us from Email
programme.desc: Intern Sabrina wants to propose writing her own column about the college experience to Boston Citizen editor Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cloud Ten
programme.desc: In an attempt to escape her problems, Sabrina decides to visit her childhood friend, Cathy Winter (Colleen Ann Fitzpatrick) in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Candidate
programme.desc: Sabrina is assigned to research the local city councilman election for an article, which will run in the Boston Citizen.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I Think I Love You
programme.desc: Sabrina's relationship with Josh couldn't be going better until Josh tells her that he loves her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Arrangement
programme.desc: Sabrina's devilish Aunt Irma returns for yet another unexpected visit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Zelda's boyfriend breaks up with her she cooks up a storm to drown her sorrows.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina gets an unexpected surprise when ex-boyfriend Derek stops by to say hello.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Competition
programme.desc: A friendly game of tennis turns into a battle of the sexes when Josh tells Sabrina that women are not as competitive as men.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I, Busybody
programme.desc: Always willing to help others with their problems, whether they ask for it or not, Sabrina finds herself in a heap of trouble when her advice goes awry.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Guilty
programme.desc: When Sabrina uses a little magic to get Zelda nominated for an award, she has no idea what she's started.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Whole Ball of Wax
programme.desc: When Sabrina gets an eerie feeling that she is being followed, she decides to take matters into her own hands but ends up face-to-face with her mother Diana.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Driving Mr. Goodman
programme.desc: Sabrina persuades Miles Goodman to get his driver's license and finds herself in the middle of a nasty lawsuit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I Fall to Pieces
programme.desc: When Hilda's boyfriend breaks up with her, she is devastated and claims that she is through with men.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Total Sabrina Live
programme.desc: Sabrina’s search for a job takes her to NYC and the Mtelevision studios.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Big Head
programme.desc: Sabrina has to write about an obnoxious pop star, who threatens to sue the magazine unless she apologises! Plus, Roxie and Morgan try to train Salem.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Call Me Crazy
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to impress her colleagues but accidentally says far too much about her magical life, making everyone think that she's totally crazy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Shift Happens
programme.desc: Sabrina is worried about having to interview a hip-hop star, but a spell to make them nicer backfires, and causes the pair to switch personalities.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Free Sabrina
programme.desc: Reporter Sabrina follows a story and almost lands herself in jail.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Unplugged
programme.desc: Sabrina encounters animated Shaggy and Scooby Doo inside Leonard's computer while trying to destroy proof of her powers.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witch Way Out
programme.desc: Sabrina meets a gallery owner (guest star Austin Peck) who already possesses a leprechaun (guest star Verne Troyer) and wants a witch to round out his collection.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Bada-Ping
programme.desc: Sabrina believes a musician (guest star Richard Voll) is being blackmailed by a gangster (guest star Garry Marshall); Avril Lavigne (guest starring as herself) performs. Emily Hart also guest stars.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: It's a Hot, Hot, Hot, Hot Christmas
programme.desc: The girls spend Christmas in Miami where Roxie runs into her ex-con mom.
programme.sub-title: It's a Hot, Hot, Hot, Hot Christmas

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Ping, Ping a Song
programme.desc: It’s fame versus friendship when the girls vie for a spot on a popular television talent show.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Lyin, the Witch, and the Wardrobe
programme.desc: Sabrina lands an interview with British pop star Daniel Bedingfield (guest starring as himself); Sabrina gets Morgan a gig as the wardrobe stylist for the photo shoot.
programme.sub-title: The Lyin, the Witch, and the Wardrobe

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: In Sabrina We Trust
programme.desc: The only way Sabrina can reverse a spell is to tell Roxie the truth about being a witch, and Salem induces Morgan to pamper him.
