programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Temptation of the Keto Guido
programme.desc: Snooki tas på fersken når hun stjeler fra en stripper, Vinny blir fristet og synder kanskje, og Pauly D leter etter kjærlighet.
programme.sub-title: The Temptation of the Keto Guido

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Umm, Hello
programme.desc: Det er guttas helg og jentene skal hjem og besøke sine kjære. Med jentene ute av huset bestemmer Pauly seg for å invitere deres tidligere samboer, Angelina, til Miami.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Meatball Training Day
programme.desc: Angelina er tilbake i Miami og huset er i full gang igjen. Etter år med konflikter og tumulter - klarer Angelina å komme på godfot med sine gamle samboere?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Angelina Leaves Her Mark!
programme.desc: Guidoene fortsetter festen på Bahamas, og Angelina forlater gjengen på sjokkerende vis.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: JWoww vs. The Proposal
programme.desc: Ronnie er på vei utfor igjen, Vinny får en smak av hjemme, og irritasjon mellom Mike og Jwoww kan ødelegge Mikes frieri.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Future Mrs. Situation?
programme.desc: Ronnie setter spørsmålstegn ved alt, mens Mike forbereder seg på å fri til Lauren.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Final Supper
programme.desc: Utblåsninger serveres med knyttnever under den siste familiemiddagen når det koker over for Ronnie og The Situation.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Snookiest Moments
programme.desc: Jenni, Ronnie, Snooki, Deena og Pauly teller ned Snookis 15 morsomste, mest opprørende og uforglemmelige duste-øyeblikk.
programme.sub-title: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Snookiest Moments

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Hottest Hookups
programme.desc: Vinny, Mike, Deena og Pauly teller ned de 15 heiteste Jersey Shore-dates fra Seaside til Miami til Italy og tilbake igjen.
programme.sub-title: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Hottest Hookups

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Biggest Blow-ups
programme.desc: Jenni, Ronnie, Vinny, Pauly og Mike teller ned de 14 største kranglene som har skjedd i Jersey Shore-serien, og ser tilbake på de beste fornærmelsene, slagene og slåsskampene.
programme.sub-title: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Biggest Blow-ups

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Most Jersiest Moments
programme.desc: Mike, Pauly, Ronnie og Vinny treffes og ser tilbake på de 'Jersieste' øyeblikkene fra deres familieferie i Miami. Vi ser de beste spiralene, de aller morsomste pussene, de verste toalettene og fem scener som vi aldri har fått se før.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Las Vegas på en ny familieferie for å møte Ronnies baby. Men når Ronnies kjærlighetsdrama spres på sosiale medier, vet ingen hva de kan forvente av ham.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Oh, Canada
programme.desc: Vinny og Pauly drar til Canada, Jwoww konfronterer romkameratene, og sannheten om Ronnies forhold holder på å bli avslørt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Truth About Ronnie
programme.desc: Romkameratene støtter Ron når sannheten om forholdet hans blir avslørt; gjengen drar på kasino for å vinne stort; og Jen vender tilbake til suiten for å konfrontere noen ansikt til ansikt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Vinny savner kjæresten og guidoene får en spesialleveranse fra Staten Island. Ronnie prøver å plukke opp bitene etter en stygg episode med moren til barnet hans.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Frenemies
programme.desc: Vennskap settes på prøve når Jenni blir helt Jwoww på Angelina og Snooki havner i midten og agerer som dommer.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Designation
programme.desc: Jenni tar farvel med Las Vegas og en kveld med festing gjør at Pauly tar noen tvilsomme avgjørelser.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Four Guidos and a Baby
programme.desc: Mens Nicole og Jenni forsøker å reparere vennskapet sitt, tar Vinny og Pauly sitt forhold til neste nivå. Gutta ender Vegas-turen med alle små guidoers drøm.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Back to Seaside
programme.desc: Med Vegas bak seg, drar guidoene tilbake til 2009 med en ferie på Seaside der det hele begynte.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Vinny and Angelina: A Love Story
programme.desc: På Seaside blir det kaotisk mellom Vinny og Angelina, og guidoene koser seg med en hyggelig kveld i det gamle huset sitt.
programme.sub-title: Vinny and Angelina: A Love Story

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: What a Drag
programme.desc: Deena finner ut kjønnet til sin lille kjøttbolle, Ronnie kommer på overraskelsesbesøk, og det blir interessant når guidoene tar med seg sine kjærester til Atlantic City for å se DJ Pauly D spinne.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Johnny Get Your Gun
programme.desc: Violence invades 7th Heaven as Mary's date tries to rough her up, and Simon is threatened by a schoolmate with a gun.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: No Sex Some Drugs and a Little Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: Mary learns about the danger of natural energy boosters when a teammate is felled by the supposedly safe pills.
programme.sub-title: No Sex Some Drugs and a Little Rock 'n' Roll

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Let's Talk About Sex
programme.desc: It's sex in 7th Heaven as Mary sneaks off to a co-ed sleepover, Lucy wants to take her relationship with Jordan to the next level, and Mom befriends two pregnant unwed teens.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Here Comes Santa Claus
programme.desc: Matt works as the shopping mall Santa, and Eric and Annie exchange gifts from the heart on this 7th Heaven Christmas. Tim Conway guest stars.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Noboy Knows…
programme.desc: Mary can't get the hang of parallel parking, so she uses her feminine wiles to pass her driver's test.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: All That Jazz
programme.desc: A friend of Lucy's seeks refuge in her closet as she tries to deal with the death of his mother.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: The Tribes That Bind
programme.desc: The church ladies throw Annie a baby shower and end up snooping in her house!

programme.title: 7th Heaven: In Praise of Women
programme.desc: The Camdens await the arrival of the twins as Annie endures a long, hard labor.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: Matt takes a job as a fast food delivery boy to get out of the house and away from the crying babies.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Paranoia
programme.desc: Lucy's ex-boyfriend Jimmy Moon is in serious trouble, and she desperately tries to help him.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: Sometimes That's Just the Way It Is
programme.desc: Mary and Lucy narrowly escape serious injury when a drunk driver smashes into their car.
programme.sub-title: Sometimes That's Just the Way It Is

programme.title: 7th Heaven: We the People
programme.desc: Mrs. Hinkle, Mary, Lucy, and even Matt and Shana lend a hand to their industrious younger siblings with the paper route.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: The Voice
programme.desc: The custodian at Simon's school tells the Reverend that he's been hearing the voice of God.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: All Dogs Go To Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's trying to look out for his younger sister, but Mary is fighting for her right to party.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: There Goes the Bride (Part 1)
programme.desc: In the first of this two-part episode, Heather is back in town and getting married, but Matt finds out an awful secret about her fiance.

programme.title: 7th Heaven: There Goes the Bride (Part 2)
programme.desc: In the dramatic conclusion of this two-part episode, Heather finds out the ugly truth about her betrothed, while Matt tries to convince Shana that he still loves her.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt finally moves out and Dad visits the hospital via the emergency room.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's post heart-attack zest for life is making everyone a little crazy.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China II NO
programme.desc: Wong Fei-hung treffer på White Lotus, en fanatisk sekt som prøver å drive europeerne ut av Kina med vold. Med sine venner, nære og kjære og Kinas fremtid på spill, må han nok en gang hente frem sine kampsportferdigheter for å forsvare de uskyldige.

programme.title: Police Story 2 NO
programme.desc: Med narkotikakongen Chu Tao bak lås og slå lever inspektør Chan og kjæresten hans et rolig og lykkelig liv. Men når Tao blir erklært dødssyk blir han sluppet ut fra fengsel for å få noen siste måneder i frihet.

programme.title: Winners and Sinners NO
programme.desc: Fem gode venner blir løslatt fra fengsel, fast bestemt på å leve lovlydige liv fra nå av. Sammen starter de et rengjøringsfirma, og starten på deres nye liv er et faktum. Men samme dag løslates også en sjette fange som har en motsatt plan.

programme.title: Spiritual Kung Fu
programme.desc: Yi-Lang er klassens klovn i shaolin-tempelet hvor han studerer kampsport. Når en mystisk bok blir stjålet fra tempelbiblioteket, blir Yi-Lang anklaget for slurv, og sammen med noen andre munker blir han straffet for uoppmerksomhet.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Politimannen Muscle fra Hong Kong drar til Japan på jakt etter en korrupt kollega. Men siden yakuzaen allerede har opplysninger om ham, kan han ikke gjøre jobben på egen hånd. Etter hvert kaller de inn barndomsvennene til Muscle for å hjelpe til.

programme.title: Half a Loaf of Kung Fu
programme.desc: Jackie Chan spiller den unge klønete Jiang. Jiang vokste opp uten foreldre og til tross for at han verken har et akademisk hode eller de kampsportferdighetene han gjerne skulle hatt, klarer han å lure seg til steder og berømmelse han bare kunne drømme om.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Winners and Sinners NO
programme.desc: Fem gode venner blir løslatt fra fengsel, fast bestemt på å leve lovlydige liv fra nå av. Sammen starter de et rengjøringsfirma, og starten på deres nye liv er et faktum. Men samme dag løslates også en sjette fange som har en motsatt plan.

programme.title: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: Wah vet knapt ordet av det før han har blitt fralurt pengene sine. Han legger de siste slantene på en rose fra en blomsterhandler som mener at blomstene hennes fører med seg lykke og velstand. Og riktig nok ser Wah snart at flaksen har snudd.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and Linda have jury duty and Jake gets a seeing-eye-dog. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake goes on a date with a blind girl and Margaret is confronted by the fact that one of her patients doesn't like her. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets into a passionate discussion about faith in the power of God versus medicine with a Priest and Jake, Reggie and Bob take a stab at the stock market.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie has a panic attack about where her life is going and Becker confesses that he misses Elizabeth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker assesses his feelings for Liz when she is offered a new job in Chicago and Linda breaks-up with Gil for lying to her. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's four attempts to watch the same movie are annoyingly interrupted, Reggie goes back to school and Hattie discovers her husband's infidelity. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is in an awkward situation when his building super is found dead of natural causes

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker had an ethical decision to make with one of his patients and Reggie is proposed to on her second date with a man. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is a mentor to a student and Reggie, Bob and Jake come to a standstill in their friendship. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is accused of being a creature of habit and as a result, tries a new restaurant.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker runs into an old flame and fights with his conscience to spend the night with her because she's a married woman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has made a resolution to quit smoking and he announces it to everyone at the diner.
programme.sub-title: Smoke em if You Got em

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Margaret has an erotic dream about John and Linda tries to analyze it. Reggie, Jake and Bob get drunk off a keg of beer. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has anxiety issues over dating a younger woman and Reggie is getting threats from an ex-convict. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Christmas turns Reggie into a competitive freak; Bob, a greedy super; Jake, a non-participant and John an Angry Head.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John inherits an urn with one of his old patients, Harry in it.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a run-in at the office with an elder hostile Jake's grandmother.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie makes John a test subject in her psychology experiment and Jake gets his driver's license renewed. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker goes on a cruise and Jake dates a supermodel. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is asked to be the keynote speaker at an early graduation for Harding High schools class of 2001.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: After her marriage ends, Megan re-enters Becker's life and he becomes aware of Megan's sordid past. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda and Reggie date the same man and Becker unwillingly gets involved. Bob finds out he has a tenant whos a prostitute. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker has insomnia and the gang tries to help him get through it. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John runs into an old college mentor/professor who doesn't remember him. This torments John who tries to get the professor to remember him. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets an unexpected visit from his godson who is reluctant to tell his father he's gay. Reggie gets into a caddy argument with her friend, Sara. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: You Say Gay Son, I Say Godson

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John thinks the new water deliveryman is bad luck. A string of mishaps occur and everyone blames it on the deliveryman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is being sued for malpractice by a patient. Louis knits Margaret a swest (sweater/vest) and Reggie, Bob and Jake discuss the worst ways to die. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Beckers patient sues him for malpractice and Bob sleeps with his Johns lawyer, Ruth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker sees a psychologist and Linda looks for a new job.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: During an attempt to quit smoking, John attends a for-kids only pancake breakfast.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Inside Man
programme.desc: Chaim Rumkowski, leader of the Lodz ghetto during WWII, believed cooperation with the Nazis could save lives, providing labor in exchange for food. This approach kept some semblance of community and culture alive amidst unimaginable horror.

programme.title: Secret War: The Special Interrogation Group
programme.desc: The SIG consisted of German speaking Jewish volunteers from Palestine. They had a highly dangerous job: which was to pose as Germans behind enemy lines and extract intelligence and do acts of sabotage. Few had a long-life expectancy.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's failed attacks in the Mediterranean region draw in the Germans.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: End Game
programme.desc: In January 1945, Nazi Germany faces defeat as Allied armies close in. Hitler, aged 55 and in poor health, remains defiant in his Berlin bunker. On April 30th, 1945, Hitler commits suicide, and days later, Germany surrenders, ending World War II.

programme.title: Secret War: Agent Garbo
programme.desc: Juan Pujol, MI6's WWII agent "Garbo," created a fictitious spy network in Lisbon, deceiving the Germans with crucial disinformation and influencing their strategies. After the war, MI6 protected him, and he lived in Venezuela until his death in 1988.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleashed 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The AK-47, the world's deadliest firearm, sparked a Cold War race for superior assault rifles like the American M4 and German HK 416. Host Wil Willis explores its history, from Mikhail Kalashnikov's WWII experiences to its assembly and lethal impact.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Former U.S. Army Ranger Wil Willis tests modern combat shotguns like the Benelli M4 and Mossberg 590, alongside historic models.This documentary features 3D animations and weapon tests to explore effectiveness of combat shotguns.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Grand Mufti
programme.desc: The controversy surrounding Mohammad Amin al-Husayni, stems from his Nazi collaboration. He recruited Bosnian Muslims and advocated for a Palestinian homeland with Nazi help. His diaries reveal awareness of the Holocaust and anti-Semitic sentiments.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Final Solution
programme.desc: This is the story of how Hitler orchestrated the genocide of 6 million Jews. Hitler portrayed Jews as a societal threat, using Goebbels' propaganda. Deportations were masked as resettlements while Auschwitz-Birkenau became a death factory.

programme.title: Mata Hari - The Beautiful Spy
programme.desc: Mata Hari. Dance, Seduction and Espionage. The enduring myth.

programme.title: Secret War: Hardy Amies and Operation Ratweek
programme.desc: Operation Ratweek’s existence has always been denied. However WMR has now discovered evidence that it existed and was carried out.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Slovenia: The Crow's Flight
programme.desc: Monty heads to Slovenia to retrace one of the most daring, yet unknown, mass escapes of Allied prisoners during the second world war, made possible only with the help of partisans and locals.

programme.title: Secret War: Double Agent Tricycle
programme.desc: Dusan Popov was almost certainly James Bond. Ian Fleming knew all the stories about him. Popov managed to persuade both the Germans and MI6 to keep him in the style of a millionaire businessman while performing a series of missions against the Nazis.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Liberation & Revenge
programme.desc: 1945 frigjør soldater fra den Røde Hæren Auschwitz-Birkenau. Når andre befrielsene finner sted i de påfølgende månedene, blir verden sjokkert.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson enrols the seven remaining contestants in a Fashion Targets Breast Cancer catwalk event for their biggest showcase yet and they also take part in a beauty shoot with a cosmetics company.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 10
programme.desc: The six remaining girls arrive in Barbados and hit the waves for a surfing-themed tourism advert. The action remains on the water for a boat-based photoshoot with Dannii Minogue and a leading hair-care brand, ahead of the dreaded elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 11
programme.desc: The final five star in a music video with Bajan pop group Cover Drive and have to learn a complicated dance routine, before Elle Macpherson challenges the contestants to model jewellery in a photoshoot set in a limestone cavern.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 12
programme.desc: The four remaining girls compete for a place in next week's final, demonstrating what they have learnt by styling themselves for a Bajan magazine cover shoot. After that, Tyson Beckford sets the contestants a challenge at a sugar plantation.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 13
programme.desc: The three remaining contestants take part in their final photoshoot a Caribbean carnival-themed catwalk show infront of an audience of industry bigwigs. Elle Macpherson, Tyson Beckford and Dannii Minogue then select the winner.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Based on the hit US reality show America's Next Top Model this UK version presented by Lisa Snowdon follows the latest group of hopefuls through their journey to becoming Britain's newest 'Top Model'.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls get their makeovers and the inevitable tears and tantrums follow. The girls pair up for a girl on girl photo shoot.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam catches Kate sneaking back into the house at night, he is determined to fix the behavior with old-school parenting tactics; Andi is dismayed when she can't find many baby pictures of Emme.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi go to great lengths to secure a loan to fix an unexpected issue on their flip house.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed; Kate is allowed to stay home alone but doesn't follow Adam and Andi's strict rules.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam offers to go on a vegan diet with Kate in an effort to bond with her, his love of meat proves a hard habit to break.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: After Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, he is still determined to take a dirt bike excursion and check it off his bucket list; Don and Adam give out bonuses at work.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam accidentally invites Andi to go on the guys' annual trip, he tries to un-invite her, which only makes matters worse.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's snooty sister in her place when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi see how much Lowell's new relationship with Andi's sister is changing him, they stage an intervention to get him to stop putting up with her bad behavior.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's doctor advises her to stop taking birth control pills, Adam and Andi disagree on an alternate option.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Dave has a cold that has him acting like a baby, and Debbie's treating him like one; Rebecca and Joanna, however, think he's overreacting and are concerned he's going to ruin their spa weekend away

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Don become super protective of Lowell when they think he might get back together with his cheating ex-wife; Joe experiences an unexpected side effect from his new pacemaker.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi offer Teddy dating advice but wind up making things super awkward for him instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam encourages Don to give himself food poisoning to get out of babysitting his destructive grandson; Adam and Andi argue over who has to take Kate and her teenage friends dress shopping.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam buys a boat without asking Andi, they wind up in couples therapy to settle the disagreement.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam discovers someone is sneaking his boat out at night, and he assumes the culprits are Don and Joe; after Andi makes Kate get a job at the mall, Kate decides she no longer wants to go to college.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don disagree about a new house to flip for their construction business, their bickering reveals bigger issues in their relationship; Andi goes to great lengths to throw the perfect birthday party for Bev.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam's mother-in-law Alice makes an unexpected visit and reveals some shocking news.
programme.sub-title: Stuck In The Middle With You

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi resort to their usual punishment in response to Teddy's bad grades, his unexpected reaction catches them off guard.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi attempt to spice up their social life by making new friends.
programme.sub-title: Adam and Andi See Other People

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam has trouble helping Katie prepare for her driving test; Don turns to Lowell for help romancing Marcy.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam tries to give Andi the perfect 20th wedding anniversary gift by re-creating their honeymoon.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: How will Challenger Toshiyuki Nakagawa try to use mochi, the traditional Japanese ingredient, against Iron Chef Chen? It's a ricey race to the finish line in this battle of mochi.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Kouji Yamada left the prestigious Tokyo University for a life as a chef. How will he battle it out with Iron Chef Sakai while his mentor looks on?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Hisao Odachi, the founder of the relatively unknown field of yakuzen cooking, comes to Kitchen Stadium. What kind of dishes will he make in his showdown with Iron Chef Chen?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In a dessert battle suited for Valentine's Day, see who reigns supreme when Fuyuko Kondo, the 4th female challenger, takes on Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kandagawa brings another female challenger, Yoshie Tobe, into the ring against Iron Chef Chen. It's a soybean battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Masuo Suzuki, a challenger from Kihachi, a restaurant Iron Chef Michiba used to go to for ideas, comes into Kitchen Stadium to issue a matsuba crab challenge.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen takes on Challenger Kunihiko Hashimoto, an authority on Japanese cuisine and beloved student of well-known Japanese chefs, for a taro potato fight to the finish.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Sakai faces a challenger known as 'Mr. Gourmet.' Komine is a world-class vegetable chef who feels right at home with the secret ingredient.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Can the former chef to Deng Xiaoping, Zeityen Wan, make magic with his noodle dishes in just one hour?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is the first pizza expert to enter Kitchen Stadium. What pizza can he create with squid?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Shigeo Yuasa is the head chef of the Okayama International Hotel. With test tubes and litmus papers, Yuasa uses shocking cooking techniques to get his meals to exacting pH levels.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Chiyo Cho has the support from the people of Kobe as he challenges Iron Chef Chen to a titanic tofu tussle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Called the 'Rokusaburo Michiba of the Atami region in Japan,' Challenger Kunio Santo battles it out with Iron Chef Sakai in the battle of clam.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Former challenger Kandagawa retaliates against the Iron Chefs by sending his head chef Keisuke Tamano. Tamano challenges Michiba to an ultimate grudge battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga welcomes Korean cuisine for the first time to Kitchen Stadium. Lee Myong Suk is the female evangelist of Korean cuisine in Japan.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The old and new of French cuisine battle each other. Challenger Isao Yanagidate opens the door to a long-term battle between Club Mistral and Club des Trentes.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Etsuo Joh, the god of sauces in classic French cuisine, takes on the Iron Chef Japanese, Rokusaburo Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga invites the very first diner cook to compete at Kitchen Stadium. Katsuo Omiya, trained in the French tradition, challenges Iron Chef Sakai to a tearful battle!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Dissatisfied with the results of their last encounter, Club Mistral is back for a rematch. Kazutaka Okabe challenges Sakai to a rematch of extreme grandeur.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Arnold brings Dan two interlocking projects. He wants FantomWorks to transform his 1946 Ford Panel Wagon into a classic tour-mobile, and he also wants Dan to fix the 1941 Harley Flathead motorcycle that will ride in the back.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Japanese car culture holds a special place in Sung's heart. He's back exploring the home of drifting to see the coolest mods, and quirkiest characters. Sung finds that a quest for brilliance and excellence makes this the best place to get inspired.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Ben wants a partial restoration for his father’s 1962 Maserati, but Dan sees only one solution – turning this heirloom into one of the rarest survivor cars on earth. Raymond and Diane only want one thing for their worn out 1966 bug – perfection.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Despite a troubled past of poverty and invasions, Korea has emerged as a car building power-house. Through its unheralded and talented-loaded car scene, Sung reconnects with the land of his birth and finds peace with his estranged mother.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are getting the sound system ready inside the 1969 Mustang Malicious Intent. The 1950 Ford has miles of wiring to install.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are priming the 1972 Nova to help prevent it from rusting. We take a look back at all the cool stuff that has happened in the shop.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are looking at a custom LS3 motor . The 1960 Corvette is getting work done on its brake pads.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Taming a 1971 Challenger R/T
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: When Ovide purchased his 1957 Bel Air sight unseen, the car was a rusted piece of junk so it’s on Dan to figure out how to restore this classic. Dino loves to go fast. His 1969 Super Bee is anything but super. Dan is tasked to feed Dino’s need for speed.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Jay brings Dan a 2012 Camaro ZL1 with poor performance and a blown supercharger. Terry wants Dan to complete a high-powered restomod of a 1931 Landau Phaeton, but the car arrives with mismatched parts and an engine that should have stayed in the junkyard.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Dan agrees to fix a 1947 Mack Firetruck that take FantomWorks into wet and uncharted territory. Ken’s 1971 Malibu Chevelle arrives as a garage ornament that hasn't run in five years, so it’s up to FantomWorks to bring this family heirloom back to life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Scott’s 1953 Fleetwood is a monumental challenge that takes a turn to the crazy when Dan has to add rare features that the car never had in the first place. John wants FantomWorks to make his 1967 Mercury Cougar roaring more fiercely than ever.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are putting the frame on the body of the 1964 Corvette Restomod. After they have the body put together they work on putting the door hinges on.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team are fighting off the Texas summer heat. Vinnie and the team are working to bless a veteran with this restoration project.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: George wants his 1967 Chevelle to be perfect, but his car has had more rats than repairs and the engine bay is too small for his dreams. Brian’s 1960 Lincoln is full of surprises, and he moment something else is fixed, a new problem surfaces.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: General Lee Considered
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Chris asks FantomWorks to breathe new life into a 1951 Mercury Woody that was sitting in a chicken coop for thirty years. Dan’s 1970 Mustang Boss arrives with a long list of problems and the speed of a sea slug.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: A 1983 Avanti shows up with $58,000 worth of mismatched parts and an escalating cascade of hidden problems. A 3100 Chevy Pick-up rolls in with rope holding the doors shut, but the team soon learns that this is the tip of a very ugly iceberg.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: From Roadrunner to Superbird
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: The 48 Dodge 4 door coupe are ready for the airbags to be installed. The 66 Corvette has a custom frame that is unique to Muscle Cars of Texas.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Will Gets Grumpy
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: When Donnie decides that he wants to take his 1968 Fastback to SEMA, Dan and FantomWorks are thrown for a loop. Now, they need to get the Fastback and a 1964 Corvette to the prestigious show within a crushing time frame.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Rocket Method
programme.desc: Considered the greatest player in the history of snooker, Ronnie O'Sullivan pulls back the curtain on his secrets to success.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 er den nye hurtige og spennende versjonen av spillet! Kom og se ukentlige konkurranser, arkiv spill, studio segmenter og mye mer.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Featuring coverage of the World Seniors Snooker 900 tournament.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900
programme.desc: Featuring coverage of the World Seniors Snooker 900 tournament.

programme.title: World Seniors Snooker 900

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mr. Zelinka is a beloved teacher who is being forced to retire because he's old. Jonathan and Mark know that he would prefer to continue teaching.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The parents of two Vietnamese children come to America to look for them after a ten-year separation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: After having been scarred in a fire, an actress becomes a counselor at a summer camp for blind children. The camp is run by Jonathan and Mark's blind friend Frank.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A young man decides to institutionalize his brother who has been completely paralyzed and speechless for many years, against the wishes of their mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark believes that God has turned Jonathan into a dog. Meanwhile, he must contend with a runaway kid and the kid's scatterbrained mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a young country singer who is hoping to follow in her mother's footsteps. Next, they help a widow mourning her late husband.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan must find a way to help Deke, a college football star whose dreams of reaching the pros are shattered by a tragic motorcycle accident.
programme.sub-title: One Fresh Batch of Lemonade - Part 1

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan enlists the aid of a gymnast to rehabilitate Deke. Meanwhile, Deke's parents have been deeply affected by the accident.
programme.sub-title: One Fresh Batch of Lemonade - Part 2

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A construction company tycoon now believes he's King Arthur, and his estranged son determines to have him declared incompetent. Can Jonathan work a reconciliation?

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark have been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: In Totem, Idaho, Dorsey Bilger has told one tall tale too many.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Newlyweds strike it rich with the discovery of borax.
programme.sub-title: Green Is the Color of Gold

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An itinerant medicine man and his daughter find only tragedy when they attempt to sell their wares in Dodge City.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When five men desert the Union Army, they are at the mercy of General Avery, who favors shooting them.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Steve Forrest guest stars as a gunfighter whose speed is legendary but who now is trying to live a quiet, nonviolent life with Teresa, the girl he loves.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hiding Behind a Star
programme.desc: Earp needs new deputies so Doc Holliday recommends his former brother-in-law for the job even though his sister-in-law hates Doc.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean names his town after a British actress who he loves but has never met.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt Earp Rides Shotgun
programme.desc: Earp is asked by Wells Fargo to ride shotgun to help catch the Purvis gang. Earp agrees but a grandmother complicates the situation when she refuses to wait for a later stage.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Bat is forced to hang Dal who he believes is innocent. Dal has been framed by the White Cap vigilantes and Earp wants to stop them.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Nineteen Notches on His Gun
programme.desc: The Dutch Henry gang is rustling cattle and killing ranch hands on some of the smaller ranches around town. Sheriff Bassett is sick so Earp and Bat decide to go undercover into the gang.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Let's Hang Curly Bill
programme.desc: Marshal Fred White tries to take the pistol from a drunk Curly Bill Brocius but White's actions cause the gun to fire and he is mortally wounded.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: With Matt out of town, Doc only has Chester to protect him when his life is threatened.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: So Long, Dora, So Long
programme.desc: As Jim Kelly and Dora Hand prepare to wed, Jim Rellance from Texas hopes to marry Dora. Dora tells him to find a younger girl and Earp tells him to leave Dodge City.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt's Brothers Join Up
programme.desc: After the death of Old Man Clanton, Doc Holliday hatches a scheme involving Wyatt's brothers to help him in his desire to create an internal fight among the Clanton gang members.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Dodge City Gets a New Marshal
programme.desc: Earp takes the job of Dodge City Marshal. He arrives to find the Sheriff and his deputy under siege and the men on Front Street trying to kill him.
programme.sub-title: Dodge City Gets a New Marshal

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt and Chester act as decoys to ambush outlaws that are masking their crimes as those of renegade Indians.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A dishonest gambler uses a mentally challenged man in a plot against Matt.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Requiem for Old Man Clanton
programme.desc: Wyatt tries to put a stop to ongoing border skirmishes between the Clanton gang and Mexican bandits.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Peter arrives in Sacramento to revive his family's fortune but learns Phineas Colby has monopolized the town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Zack and Zeke, slaves from Louisville, seek to buy their freedom by digging for gold.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: John is given the task of turning a small group of Apache men into a force that can aid the U.S. Calvary.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A singer wants to give up the fame and return home.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A young outlaw is reformed by the kindness and help of an elderly female junk collector.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An outlaw holds up a stagecoach carrying a murderer to trial.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Farmer Carlo Farelli wants to marry beautiful saloon girl Della but must first deal with a town gangster.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Hole Up
programme.desc: Wells Fargo asks Earp to go undercover into the badlands to capture Blackie Saunders wanted for a robbery and murder.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Loyalty
programme.desc: Doc Holliday hits a long winning streak at the card tables and winds up with stock in a mine and railroad, both of which soon have a tremendous jump in value.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Sam Kee, ostracized because he's Chinese, finds refuge at a fort after saving a soldier's life.

programme.title: Harlequin: Loving Evangeline
programme.desc: Robert får vite om sin brors dødelige båtulykke som får han til å dra for å hente liket. Der møter han Evie Shaw som er eieren av marinaen. Han blir besatt av sin brors mistenkelige død... og av Evie. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Recipe for Revenge
programme.desc: Caterer Carly Westin agrees to prepare a feast for a friend who wants to impress a man. But the couple is killed when she is in the kitchen. When police investigator Jack Brannigan gets involved, he must protect Carly before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Harlequin: A Change of Place
programme.desc: When troubled twin Dominique asks her bookish sister Kimberly to assume her role for a month as a glamorous Parisian model, Kimberly hesitates.

programme.title: Harlequin: Another Woman
programme.desc: Da Lisa våkner på sykehuset, husker hun ingenting:at mannen hennes Paul vil skille seg fra henne, eller at hun ble brutalt slått og etterlatt for å dø. Når Paul tar henne med hjem, må Lisa lære alt på nytt. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Treacherous Beauties
programme.desc: Anne mistenker at broren Alans død ikke var en ulykke. Hun begynner å jobbe for en familie som kan ha hatt en finger med i spillet, men blir snart forelsket i den eldste sønn. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Broken Lullaby
programme.desc: En foreldreløs jentes (Mel Harris) jakt etter fortiden begynner med et barndomsbilde av henne selv ved siden av en sjelden spilledåse, og fører henne til en lokkende skattejeger. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: At the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: En vakker barnepike(Liz) fanger oppmerksomheten Richard, en enkemann og vitenskapsmann, og hans begavede sønn Andy. Liz' liv blir truet når hun kommer for nær sannheten om hvem som drepte den tidligere hans frue. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Awakening
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter who's tracking one of her tenants convinces Sara McAllister to team up with him, they start an adventure into the dangerous world of international espionage and love.

programme.title: Harlequin: This Matter of Marriage
programme.desc: Arkitektene Hallie og Donnalee arbeider med et stort byggeprosjekt for en eksentrisk milliardær, Adam Barr. Hallieshar lett etter drømmemannen, finner ham plutselig rett ved siden av. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Hard to Forget
programme.desc: Privatdetektiv Max etterforsker Sandra Applewhites død og er overbevist om at hennes ektemann John Gilman drepte henne. Når han møter Sandras tvillingsøster Nicky, ber han henne om hjelp til å avsløre Gilman. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot høyhastighetpresanger i 'Gaver i forbifarten', opplever massiv bråstopp i 'Løperhinder' og blir opprørt av 'Kritiske mødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' foretar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood litt amatørmessig jordforflytning med 'Helgedosere', tar med ungene i butikken i 'Shoppingmonstere' og setter nesen sørover og opplever litt 'Landsens vrede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' feirer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood noen første smeller som ektepar med 'Første store feilsteg', prøver å kommunisere med berusede ved å 'Snakke fyllisk' og opplever fryktløse folk som er 'Slangesikre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hodet høyt for å unngå 'Baller fra oven', tar et lett kaotisk bad og opplever full 'Badekarinvasjon' og får hører den ufiltrerte sannheten av 'Søte små kritikere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' morer Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg i parkeringsanlegg med 'Garasjegøy', ser at avløpsåpnere kan brukes til mer enn kun nummer to i 'Mangefasetterte avløpsåpnere' og lurer døden i 'Nesten knust'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg noen ordentlige 'Foreldreoverraskelser', ruller med noen skikkelig 'Dediserte inlineløpere' og mister litt kontroll i 'Radioustyrlige'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjemmer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Carly Aquilino drinken for Drikketyver', ser nye merkelige antrekk i 'Bærbare rariteter' og får andrehånds skrubbsår av trafikanter som følger regelen 'Se i begge retninger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og gjest Carly Aquilino trappene med barn som gjør noen 'Mini-feilsteg', tester senger med 'Madrassprøving' og lokaliserer alle de løse skruene i 'Oppussingsanger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XL
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' avdekker Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farene med døråpninger i 'Dørdengt' før de drar til havs på 'Kræsjcruise' og avslutter med noen mestere i forkledning i 'Bykamuflasje'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slåss Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino mot vinden i 'Aggressiv luft', sliter med spisepinnene i 'Fomlepinner' og viser fram rare evner i 'Ferdigheter er ferdigheter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino nærmere på utsatte besteforeldre i 'Barnebarnskader', får ødelagt humøret av 'Stemningssenkere' og har det gøy med litt 'Landsens avslapping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' forårsaker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran alvorlige skader når de spiller 'Hjemmegolf', møter bygningsarbeidere som morer seg med 'Jobbskøyere' og blir vitner til vindens kraft i 'Tatt av vinden'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' deltar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran i timen med 'Forelesningssabotører', stopper hjorter som foretar 'Bukkattakk' og flipper helt når de får seg en 'Turntrøkk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' sklir Rob, Steelo og gjest Karrueche Tran rundt i gatene fordi de er 'Dårlig til å drifte', tar seg litt snacks med folk som liker å 'Småspise i alle situasjoner' og holder festen i gang med 'Bursdagsbomber'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' triller Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran ut på skumruller i 'Fatal foam', tar begrepet "hot date" til neste nivå med 'Ildfulle utekvelder' og kommer litt for nær de verste flysetenaboene i 'Ekle passasjerer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' leker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran utryddere i 'Kryppatruljen', blir spesielt følsomme og feller 'Kjærlighetstårer' og skater ute i det ville i 'Bli i parken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran nye farer ved å drikke i 'Ølskutt', møter folk som blir oppglødd når de går i bakken i 'Krasjglad' og fortsetter å kjøre i 'Kan ikke og vil ikke stoppe'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Karrueche Tran trygg avstand til 'Kanonballknusere', bommer på svingslagforsøk med 'Luftslag' og forbløffes av folk som beveger seg så smidig at 'Det kan være magi'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ute og henger med noen 'Kule utkastere', feirer folk med hodeskaller av stål i 'Knuserskaller' og skitner seg til når de tar seg et par 'Jordbad'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz farene ved å bli oppmuntret i 'Dette fikser du ikke', sjekker noen teknologifiender i 'Robothatere' før de møter noen arge englendere i 'Britisk raseri'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' skyter Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz rett i kurven med stil med 'Ballfintere', oppdager at enkelte dager er 'Umiddelbart dårlige dager' og blir vitner til søt justis på veien i 'Veikarma'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og gjestende vert Rocsi Diaz veldig oppmerksomme men gjør likevel 'Forsiktige feil', mister taket på 'Overdimensjonert last' og drar sin vei med stil i 'Smidige avskjeder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' flipper Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ut i 'Halvt baklengs', setter seg på 'Billige stoler' og ser hvem som får seg en 'Dekksmekk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tilbringer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz en smertefull dag på vannet i 'Båtknekt', går ut og blir 'Terrassevrak' og manifesterer en del smeller i 'Dårlig tiltrekning'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' passer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Rocsi Diaz godt på bakdelene sine, så de ikke blir 'Rumpestukket', tar rare omveier for å unngå 'Ville veisperringer' og går tilbake til Robs røtter med 'Skaterhatere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John II
programme.desc: I kveldens episode av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John nifse haier i 'Finneskrekk', vil ikke investere i folk som er 'Ikke banebrytende' og finner ut hva som skjer når man tar 'Slurvete snarveier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John III
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John pengerådgivning av 'Mini-Daymonds', møter noen rasende bier som skaper 'Biebataljer' og tester produkter i 'Prøv før du kjøper'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood rådløse på sjøen og blir helt 'Havkorka', kaster for mange erteposer i 'Villvest-Cornhole' og må jobbe med egen tålmodighet fordi de 'Avskyr å vente'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' klatrer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz i feil trær med 'Døde greiner', klatrer opp på feil person i 'Dårlige skulderholdere' og blir intense på kontoret med 'Ekstrem kontorstoling'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Paige Desorbo se noen ryggradpirrende fall i 'Ryggknekkere', hører hvordan Rob sparte penger for å flytte til California i 'Lagerleker' og avslutter med smerte ved vannet i 'Tørr landing'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' vil Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Paige DeSorbo unngå å få nesen ut av ledd i 'Neseborsjokk', unngår små, gira råtasser i 'Helvete på plasthjul' og kliner til med noen frampå eldre damer i 'Sugne bestemødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood sparkesykkel-kollisjoner til et høyere nivå med 'Sparkesykkelspark', konfronterer søppeldagen direkte med 'Vanskelig søppel' og snur uhell til hell i 'Utilsiktede seiere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut håret med 'Partyrotter', ler av noen ordentlige 'Krimklovner' og tar en titt på ulike 'Krasjkamera'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood X
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å bære alt i én omgang i 'For mye å bære', slår seg løs på do med 'Båskriminalitet' og er ekstremt galante som i 'De beste kjærestene'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis farene ved stiger i 'Stigekræsj', føler at de må følge fulle venner hjem i 'Fylleleveranser' og oppdager at ikke alle maskoter er like i 'Maskotproblemer'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison får en mindre hjernerystelse når hun sklir i badekaret. Når hun skal ta en MR, har hun en merkelig visjon om en mann hun nettopp har møtt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har problemer med å være upartisk i en sak når hun utvikler morsfølelser for en tenåringsgutt som er anklaget for å ha drept sin tidligere sjef.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison hjelper statsadvokaten med å finne en nær venns savnede bror. Hun blir paranoid om antiterroragenter fra regjeringen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer at broren hennes var involvert i et lokalt bankran. Mistankene hennes vokser når han uventet dukker opp i byen og blir involvert med en svindler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison etterforsker tilsynelatende tilfeldige drap, og setter familien hennes i fare. Bridgette må holde en presentasjon om morens jobb for klassen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Tre jenter blir funnet drept. Allisons syner kobler etterforsker Scanlon til saken.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer gjentatte ganger om en kvinne som blir overvåket av en fremmed mann på soverommet hennes.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison er opptatt med å etterforske dødsfallet til en lokal lege når en mann som hevder å være "Døden" begynner å dukke opp i synene hennes, noe som får henne til å frykte at hun snart skal dø.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om livet hun kunne hatt hvis hun hadde blitt advokat, som hun opprinnelig ønsket å bli.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison har tilbakevendende drømmer om fortiden hennes, noe som forårsaker merkelige og sjokkerende endringer i hennes nåværende liv.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Devalos etterforsker dødsfallet til en av hans nære venner og får hjelp av Allison, som har hatt urovekkende drømmer om en ung kvinne som ser ut til å være besatt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Tiden er viktig når en misfornøyd arbeider som ikke har noe å tape, tar Joe og tre andre som gisler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Devalos' venns søster blir myrdet og Allison prøver å hjelpe til med å løse forbrytelsen. Drømmene hennes ser imidlertid ikke ut til å gi mening, ettersom de fortsetter å implisere vennens første ektemann, som døde for to år siden.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om et spøkelse som var vitne til flere drap. I mellomtiden har Ariel en merkelig reaksjon på en oppgave i helsetimen.
programme.sub-title: Things to Do in Phoenix When You're Dead

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Mens hun jobber med en 17 år gammel forbrytelse, viser Allison uvanlig oppførsel som kan være avgjørende for å løse saken, men som samtidig setter familien hennes i fare.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison våkner under en motorvei uten å vite hvor hun er eller hvordan hun kom dit. Hennes mangel på hukommelse får henne til å begynne å tenke at hun kan ha drept noen med bilen sin.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bedt av Devalos om å hjelpe noen av vennene hans med å finne deres savnede datter, men møter motstridende bevis på hvem som er ansvarlig for hennes forsvinning.
programme.sub-title: A Taste of Her Own Medicine

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Flere urovekkende drømmer om en forestående apokalypse får Allison til å ta drastiske tiltak som forberedelse til sivilisasjonens undergang.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison får nok en gang besøk av spøkelset til agent Cooper, som prøver å hjelpe henne med å finne ut hvem den virkelige morderen er i en forvirrende sak.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Sully opposes the building of a dam, he finds himself on the other side of the law and behind bars.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike's revered Uncle Theodore shocks her and Sully when he criticizes their parenting skills and offers to take Brian to Boston.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike sees that the marriage of Kid Cole and Sister Ruth is unraveling for no apparent reason.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike reminisces about her tumultuous career – the successes and the failures -- since living in Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully’s best friend, Daniel Simon, falls in love with Dr. Mike.
programme.sub-title: A HOUSE DIVIDED, PART 1 (aka Between Friends, Pt. 1)

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully’s best friend, Daniel Simon, falls in love with Dr. Mike.
programme.sub-title: A HOUSE DIVIDED, PART 2 (aka Between Friends, Pt. 2)

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike, Brian and Katie are taken hostage by bank robbers.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Quinn and the townspeople excitedly welcome poet Walt Whitman to Colorado Springs until rumors about his personal life begin to circulate.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Horace attempts suicide after receiving the official divorce document from Myra.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike is scandalized by the new liberated lifestyle her sister has adopted as a suffragette.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully and Brian forge a true father-son bond.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The government puts a price on Sully’s head when he organizes an escape for Cloud Dancing that results in a deadly massacre.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Everyone but Michaela assumes that Sully is dead when he disappears after a fight with his nemesis, Sgt. O’Connor.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully struggles to survive in the wilderness as Dr. Mike desperately searches for him.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike hides Sully to protect him from the army who wanted to arrest him but believe he is dead.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Indian attacks continue in Colorado Springs as Hank names himself sheriff, determined to prove Sully is alive.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike, who believes she may be pregnant again, broods about Sully’s fate at the hands of the army.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike is dismayed when a Russian princess who claims to be a psychic mesmerizes the town.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle begynner å jobbe for Daniel. Blake er imot dette og krangler med Reece. Dex er rasende på Alexis for at hun dro til Sumatra for å møte faren til Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle lanserer sin nye virksomhet med å kjøpe en araberhest. Steven og Luke blir stadig mer tiltrukket av hverandre.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake vender triumferende tilbake fra forhandlingene med kineserne. Alexis sverger på å kjøpe seg inn i foretagendet. Krystle, som er ukomfortabel med Daniels økende oppmerksomhet, unngår ham.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis prøver å overtale lederen av den kinesiske delegasjonen til å hyre Colbyco. Blake er overrasket over å høre at Lady Ashley er i Acapulco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda tilbringer natten sammen med prins Michael, og blir knust da hun hører at han er forlovet. Dex overtaler den kinesiske delegasjonen til å hyre selskapet sitt i stedet for Blakes til en viktig borejobb.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Anspenheten mellom Krystle og Blake stiger i takt med mistenksomheten. Claudia angrer på at hun lå med Adam. Dominique forpurrer Alexis' forsøk på å kjøpe ut selskapet hennes.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dominique forblir i kritisk tilstand etter at hun kollapser. Luke kommer på uventet besøk til Steven. Blake forteller sønnen at han vil støtte ham på tross av hans legning.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis prøver å overtale kong Galen til å tillate giftermål mellom Amanda og sønnen hans. Hun prøver å lokke med at landet hans vil få en del av Colbycos inntekter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis blir lettet, og Blake blir bekymret, når Amanda plutselig ombestemmer seg og vil gifte seg med prins Michael. Sammy Jo avsløres som synderen bak de kompromitterende fotografiene.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia flyr til Mexico for å skille seg fra Steven. Adam dukker uventet opp på hotellet hennes, og de tilbringer natten sammen.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake og Daniel overlever flystyrten. Jeff leier et helikopter og trosser farlige værforhold, og finner til slutt flyvraket.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle blir med Daniel til New York slik at han kan gjenforenes med Sammy Jo, datteren han aldri har møtt.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Når Alexis og Amanda kommer ut av en eksklusiv brudesalong, bråstopper en bil og Amanda blir dratt inn. En forrykende biljakt følger.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex forteller en knust Krystle at Daniel Reece er død. Steven blir rasende når Sammy Jo bestemmer seg for å gå rettens vei for å få omsorgen for sønnen. Jeff frir til Ashley.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Elena innrømmer overfor Amanda at det ikke skjedde noe på soverommet med prins Michael. Sammy Jo utstyrer romkameraten sin, Rita, med en blond parykk, og hun øver seg på å etterligne Krystles stemme.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Aftermath
programme.desc: De som overlever massakren i Moldavia blir adskilt og holdes fanget i palasset når terroristene tar makten. Krystle og Alexis sitter i palassets fangehull.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake sørger for at Krystle og Alexis slipper fri, og familiene drar tilbake fra Moldavia. Luke blir begravet. Ritas kjæreste, Joel, er ivrig etter å hjelpe Sammy Jo videre med intrigene.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake mottar et forretningsforslag fra Jason Colby, som han ikke har sett på 20 år. Jeffs tante, Constance, ber ham komme til California når hun får vite at broren hennes, Jason ligger for døden.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle overrasker Sammy Jo med et besøk i New York. Adam blir med Claudia til San Francisco. Constance gir nevøen, Jeff, 50 % av Colby Enterprises.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The U.S.S. Enterprise tracks a mysterious SOS to an ancient planet presumed long dead.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Enterprise is sent to planet Ekos to investigate a disappearance of Federation historian John Gill.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise's command crew must thwart an invasion by aliens from another galaxy who plan to conquer this one.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise finds a planet devastated by disease that appears to treat the American flag with great reverence.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Starfleet uses the Enterprise to test a new super-sophisticated computer, but it soon develops a mind of its own.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew investigates the disappearance of a ship's crew on a planet that is a modern version of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk must decide whether to thwart or help a traveller from the future sent back to 1960s Earth on a secret mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise pursues a mysterious woman who has abducted Spock's brain.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Captain Kirk becomes increasingly erratic and orders the Enterprise into Romulan space. Here, the ship is captured by a beautiful Romulan commander.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk loses his memory and is proclaimed a God while trapped on a planet whose inhabitants are descended from Northwestern Native Americans.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise reaches a Federation colony where the adults have all killed themselves but the children play without care.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Miranda Jones, a telepath who studied mental disciplines on Vulcan, arrives with Ambassador Kolos, a Medusan.
programme.sub-title: Is There In Truth No Beauty?

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When coming to a xenophobic isolationist planet, Captain Kirk and his landing party are punished for trespassing.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When the Enterprise brings aboard Klingon prisoners, an alien entity pits both sides against each other in an ever-escalating struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: At the same time McCoy discovers that he has a year to live, the U.S.S. Enterprise encounters the asteroid Yonada which is determined to be artificially propelled.
programme.sub-title: For The World Is Hollow And I Have Touched The Sky

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk is trapped in interphase, while the Enterprise is trapped by a powerful energy web.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty is surprised when Greg Norbert and MetroCapital express interest in acquiring Galweather; the Pod flies to Indiana to consult for a beverage company, where Marty applies his management skills to turn a loss into a win.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty must bring his son Roscoe to his next job in San Francisco but ends up forced to babysit the teenage CEO of a security software company while Roscoe spends all his time with the Pod; newly engaged Jeannie has a tryst with a tortured musician.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Jeannie is placed in charge of a consulting gig when the racist CEO of a no-frills motel chain in Utah won't take Marty seriously; Clyde tries to make inroads with a virginal Mormon woman; Monica and Roscoe's parent-son bonding takes a dark turn.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty goes to war with his son's school when Roscoe is accused of sexual harassment for trying to kiss a boy and deals with the reappearance of April the stripper; Jeannie starts to get cold feet at the prospect of her upcoming wedding.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty tries to stay monogamous on the road while consulting for a pharmaceutical company, which puts Jeannie in the position of "taking one for the team" and fully satisfy a female client; Jeremiah reveals a secret to April; Monica drops a bombshell.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty and The Pod take part in the annual Galweather-Stearn recruiting event where the best and brightest from ivy-league business schools are wined and dined.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty and the Pod are put through the wringer by their arch-rival firm as part of the pending merger; Jeannie does her best to keep marriage at bay; Marty learns about Jeremiah's secret and receives shocking news from Monica.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Jeannie leads the Pod to her hometown on a mission to resurrect an ailing church; Marty enters into custody mediation with Monica but her powers of manipulation are in full force, threatening Marty's relationship with April.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty and "The Rainmaker" work together to put the kibosh on their firm's acquisition by MetroCapital but a back-stabbing turn of events leaves them mortal enemies; in the aftermath of the news about April, Marty must deal with attitude from Roscoe.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: In the Season 1 finale, Marty and the Pod fight to pull off an eleventh-hour reprieve and stop the MetroCapital acquisition from happening; Jeannie makes a decision about marrying Wes; Marty's son Roscoe makes a life-altering choice of his own.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty and the Pod adjust to the "new" Galweather Stearn in the aftermath of a sexual harassment scandal.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty and the Pod head to Las Vegas to help an aging casino regain its luster.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty and Clyde attempt to woo the business of the new Las Vegas casino king, a maverick self-made millionaire who notoriously hates consultants.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: When superstar Matt Damon calls on Galweather Stearn to find him a charity to enhance his image, Marty discovers he may have to go further than he's willing to keep the celebrity's business.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty gets a surprise visit from his militantly pro-social younger brother Malcolm, whose reasons for resurfacing after three years seem dubious.
programme.sub-title: Sincerity is an Easy Disguise in This Business

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty questions his commitment to Galweather Stearn when events at an executive retreat come into conflict with his plans to do something important for Roscoe.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty faces a moral dilemma when he discovers evidence of a banking client's role in a cover-up scheme.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Jeannie meets an unlikely suitor when consulting with an adult toy company. While on the engagement, Doug is struck with inspiration for a wild gift idea for his new girlfriend.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Doug and Clyde are summoned to testify in a legal deposition for their role in a wrongful death suit filed against a big telecommunications company.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty covertly makes strides with his future in mind. However, his most trusted colleague Jeannie questions her own future when presented with a great career opportunity.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty is pushed to the brink when trying to finalize a business deal with an erratic and temperamental Las Vegas casino magnate.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Doug pops the question to his girlfriend who plans a shotgun wedding in Las Vegas on the eve of the Pod closing a major business deal there.

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Marty and the Pod adjust to the "new" Galweather Stearn in the aftermath of a sexual harassment scandal.

programme.desc: Marty gets a surprise visit from his militantly pro-social younger brother Malcolm, whose reasons for resurfacing after three years seem dubious.
