programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & The 100th Episode
programme.desc: Charlie has to make a decision between keeping his group and being a sports psychologist for a baseball team.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Goes Back to Therapy
programme.desc: The first episode in which Charlie – a baseball player with anger issues turned anger management therapist – decides to return to therapy after a bad run-in with his ex wife's new boyfriend.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & The Slumpbuster
programme.desc: Charlie deals with a ghost from his old carousing, baseball-playing days when a unattractive woman he slept with just to break a batting slump shows up as a new patient in group therapy.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and Kent Battle over a Patient
programme.desc: A long-standing rivalry over who's a better therapist leads to war when Kate steals Patrick, one of Charlie's group patients.
programme.sub-title: Charlie and Kent Battle over a Patient

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Tries Sleep Deprivation
programme.desc: Charlie challenges his group to do 36 hours of sleep deprivation therapy so that their \\"inhibitions come down and the truth comes out\\" - except the result turns out to be the exact opposite.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie's Patient Gets Out of Jail
programme.desc: Charlie and his ex are having an issue with how he still tries to manage her life, when one of his patients from his prison anger therapy group shows up on his doorstep, fresh out on parole.
programme.sub-title: Charlie's Patient Gets Out of Jail

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Dates Kate's Patient
programme.desc: Inflamed by Kate's comment that he's only \\"nouveau smart\\", Charlie starts covertly dating a brilliant coffee-shop barista.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Tries to Prove Therapy is Legit
programme.desc: Charlie falls for Jen's hot new business partner, Lori - played by Charlie's real-life ex, Denise Richards - only to find she thinks therapy is a scam.
programme.sub-title: Charlie Tries to Prove Therapy is Legit

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Outs A Patient
programme.desc: Charlie has to evaluate the depth of his involvement in his patient's lives when he accidentally helps his patient who vicariously enjoys other people's anger hook up with a crazy woman.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie's Dad Visits
programme.desc: Charlie gets an unexpected visit from his hyper-critical, bullying father – played by Charlie's real-life dad, Martin Sheen.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Gets Romantic
programme.desc: After Charlie and Kate have sex, he innocently asks her if she wants to go to a movie.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlies Loses it at a Baby Shower
programme.desc: Charlie blows up at his sister's baby shower.
programme.sub-title: Charlies Loses it at a Baby Shower

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie's Dad Starts to Lose It
programme.desc: Charlie isn't sure if his father, Martin, is developing Alzheimer's.
programme.sub-title: Charlie's Dad Starts to Lose It

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie abd the Ex-Patient
programme.desc: Charlie begins a questionable romantic relationship with an ex-patient.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie's Dad Breaks Bad
programme.desc: Charlie's dad falls in with a bad crowd.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & Jen Together Again
programme.desc: Jennifer moves in with Charlie temporarily and Kate gets jealous.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and Deception Therapy
programme.desc: Charlie tries to help his patient, Ed (Barry Corbin), with a placebo pill that's supposedly reduces anger.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Dates a Teacher
programme.desc: Charlie dates his daughter, Sam's, teacher.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and Cee Lo
programme.desc: Charlie takes on Cee Lo Green as an anger therapy patient.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Is An Expert Witness
programme.desc: Charlie and Kate face off as expert witnesses in the same trial.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & Catholicism
programme.desc: Charlie and his dad (Martin Sheen) get into it when Martin has Charlie's daughter, Sam, baptized behind Charlie's back.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Dates Crazy, Sexy, Angry
programme.desc: Charlie makes an unpleasant discovery about Jennifer's business partner

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Gets Lindsay Lohan Into Trouble
programme.desc: When Lindsay Lohan comes to Charlie for therapy, they begin a tumultuous relationship.
programme.sub-title: Charlie Gets Lindsay Lohan Into Trouble

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and Lacey Piss Off the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Charlie upsets his neighbors by meeting with his clients at home.
programme.sub-title: Charlie and Lacey Piss Off the Neighborhood

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & Kate Horse Around
programme.desc: Charlie takes the group on an equine therapy trip.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie's Patients Hook Up
programme.desc: Two patients in Charlie's group get involved in a romantic relationship.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and Kate's Dirty Pictures
programme.desc: Charlie uses a patient to spy on Kate when he gets jealous

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Lets Kate Take Charge
programme.desc: Martin helps Charlie coach a high-school baseball team

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & The Break-Up Coach
programme.desc: Jennifer causes problems for Charlie when she becomes involved with one of his patients

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie, Kate and Jen Get Romantic
programme.desc: Martin meddles with Charlie and Kate's relationship.
programme.sub-title: Charlie, Kate and Jen Get Romantic

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Breaks Up With Kate
programme.desc: Charlie deals with Jen's ex-boyfriend

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and Kate Start a Sex Study
programme.desc: Charlie and Kate begin work on a sex study. Meanwhile, Lacey starts a new job.
programme.sub-title: Charlie and Kate Start a Sex Study

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and His New Friend With Benefits
programme.desc: Charlie enters an inappropriate relationship. Meanwhile, Nolan and Patrick fight over a woman
programme.sub-title: Charlie and His New Friend With Benefits

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and the Airport Sext
programme.desc: Charlie gets interesting news from Kate. Later, Charlie's house is used for an adult film shoot.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and His New Therapist
programme.desc: Charlie meets with an unorthodox therapist. Later, Patrick tricks Ed into thinking he won the lottery.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & The Hot Nerd
programme.desc: Charlie steals a hot woman from an angry nerd. Lacey takes drugs in order to sell drugs.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie and the Secret Gigolo
programme.desc: Charlie learns scandalous information about Jen's new boyfriend, Sean, when he joins his therapy group. Also, Ed moves in with Patrick.

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie Dates A Serial Killer's Sister
programme.desc: Charlie picks up a woman at prison, unaware that she is the sister of one of his most violent patients. Lacey secretly puts on a strip show for Nolan
programme.sub-title: Charlie Dates A Serial Killer's Sister

programme.title: Anger Management: Charlie & The Cheating Patient
programme.desc: Charlie suspects Jen's boyfriend is cheating on her. Later, Nolan's apartment gets robbed.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Hoping to make a better life at Corleone Junior High, Chris his hat in the ring for Class President and asks Greg to be his running mate

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Rochelle decides to host a neighborhood watch meeting after Julius' truck is stolen, but her good intentions quickly turn competitive when her new neighbor, Louise thinks she'd make a better block captain than Rochelle.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: After failing to make an impression at the town hall meeting, Chris realizes that he needs to deliver the best campaign speech of all time if he's going to win the election for class president.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: After Chris accidentally misleads the neighborhood into thinking he and Tasha are dating, Rochelle gets quite an earful from Tasha's grandmother, Louise

programme.desc: After Julius lends Chris a pair of lucky socks, Chris begins to notice that he can do no wrong.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.desc: When Chris accidentally shows up for school on a "snow day," he and Principal Edwards (Alexander) are stuck with each other until they can reach Chris' parents.

programme.desc: When Chris thwarts Malvo's attempt at stealing a gold chain from Vanessa, Malvo gives Chris one day - or suffer the consequences - to produce a replacement necklace.

programme.desc: Chris is put in a difficult position when he must choose between going to a baseball game with his dad and Drew and going to the movies with Tasha

programme.desc: Chris becomes Bed- Stuy's favorite odds-maker after Doc discovers he has a natural talent for predicting a game's outcome.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: After secretly listening to his parents' comedy albums, tries out some dirty jokes on his classmates and discovers that making people laugh is the key to popularity, but his teacher has a different take on the situation.

programme.desc: With Chris's entire class counting on him to master algebra in time for a math competition, Rochelle takes it upon herself to tutor Chris.

programme.desc: After Chris tests poorly on a standard exam, his teacher, Ms. Morello, refers him to the school's guidance counselor, Mr. Abbott.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Caruso relinquishes his role as school bully after getting bullied himself. However, without Caruso to establish the school's power hierarchy and with everyone vying to fill his shoes, Chris and Greg realize they'd better come up with a fast solution.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.desc: As a result of their apartment being broken into, Julius and Rochelle decide it's a good idea to get a dog, something Chris has always wanted.

programme.desc: With no extracurricular activities to his name, Chris decides to join the writing staff of the school newspaper.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.desc: When Chris' entire family comes down with the flu, Rochelle and Julius make arrangements for Mr. Omar to look after Chris until the family recovers.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.desc: Chris and his family decide to take a trip down South to attend the funeral of Julius' distant relative.
